69ClientConnection::ClientConnection(Minecraft *minecraft, const wstring& ip, int port)
70{
71 // 4J Stu - No longer used as we use the socket version below.
72 assert(FALSE);
73#if 0
74 // 4J - added initiliasers
75 random = new Random();
76 done = false;
77 level = false;
78 started = false;
79
80 this->minecraft = minecraft;
81
82 Socket *socket;
83 if( gNetworkManager.IsHost() )
84 {
85 socket = new Socket(); // 4J - Local connection
86 }
87 else
88 {
89 socket = new Socket(ip); // 4J - Connection over xrnm - hardcoded IP at present
90 }
91 createdOk = socket->createdOk;
92 if( createdOk )
93 {
94 connection = new Connection(socket, L"Client", this);
95 }
96 else
97 {
98 connection = nullptr;
99 delete socket;
100 }
101#endif
102}
103
104ClientConnection::ClientConnection(Minecraft *minecraft, Socket *socket, int iUserIndex /*= -1*/)
105{
106 // 4J - added initiliasers
107 random = new Random();
108 done = false;
109 level = nullptr;
110 started = false;
111 savedDataStorage = new SavedDataStorage(nullptr);
112 maxPlayers = 20;
113
114 this->minecraft = minecraft;
115
116 if( iUserIndex < 0 )
117 {
118 m_userIndex = ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad();
119 }
120 else
121 {
122 m_userIndex = iUserIndex;
123 }
124
125 if( socket == nullptr )
126 {
127 socket = new Socket(); // 4J - Local connection
128 }
129
130 createdOk = socket->createdOk;
131 if( createdOk )
132 {
133 connection = new Connection(socket, L"Client", this);
134 }
135 else
136 {
137 connection = nullptr;
138 // TODO 4J Stu - This will cause issues since the session player owns the socket
139 //delete socket;
140 }
141
142 deferredEntityLinkPackets = vector<DeferredEntityLinkPacket>();
143}
144
145bool ClientConnection::isPrimaryConnection() const
146{
147 // On host, all connections are primary (server is authoritative).
148 // On non-host, only the primary pad processes shared entity state.
149 return g_NetworkManager.IsHost() || m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad();
150}
151
152ClientConnection* ClientConnection::findPrimaryConnection() const
153{
154 if (level == nullptr) return nullptr;
155 int primaryPad = ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad();
156 MultiPlayerLevel* mpLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel*)level;
157 for (ClientConnection* conn : mpLevel->connections)
158 {
159 if (conn != this && conn->m_userIndex == primaryPad)
160 return conn;
161 }
162 return nullptr;
163}
164
165bool ClientConnection::shouldProcessForEntity(int entityId) const
166{
167 if (g_NetworkManager.IsHost()) return true;
168 if (m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()) return true;
169
170 ClientConnection* primary = findPrimaryConnection();
171 if (primary == nullptr) return true;
172 return !primary->isTrackingEntity(entityId);
173}
174
175bool ClientConnection::shouldProcessForPosition(int blockX, int blockZ) const
176{
177 if (g_NetworkManager.IsHost()) return true;
178 if (m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()) return true;
179
180 ClientConnection* primary = findPrimaryConnection();
181 if (primary == nullptr) return true;
182 return !primary->m_visibleChunks.count(chunkKey(blockX >> 4, blockZ >> 4));
183}
184
185bool ClientConnection::anyOtherConnectionHasChunk(int x, int z) const
186{
187 if (level == nullptr) return false;
188 MultiPlayerLevel* mpLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel*)level;
189 int64_t key = chunkKey(x, z);
190 for (ClientConnection* conn : mpLevel->connections)
191 {
192 if (conn != this && conn->m_visibleChunks.count(key))
193 return true;
194 }
195 return false;
196}
197
198ClientConnection::~ClientConnection()
199{
200 m_trackedEntityIds.clear();
201 m_visibleChunks.clear();
202 delete connection;
203 delete random;
204 delete savedDataStorage;
205}
206
207void ClientConnection::tick()
208{
209 if (!done) connection->tick();
210 connection->flush();
211}
212
213INetworkPlayer *ClientConnection::getNetworkPlayer()
214{
215 if( connection != nullptr && connection->getSocket() != nullptr) return connection->getSocket()->getPlayer();
216 else return nullptr;
217}
218
219void ClientConnection::handleLogin(shared_ptr<LoginPacket> packet)
220{
221 if (done) return;
222
223 PlayerUID OnlineXuid;
224 ProfileManager.GetXUID(m_userIndex,&OnlineXuid,true); // online xuid
225 MOJANG_DATA *pMojangData = nullptr;
226
227 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsLocalGame())
228 {
229 pMojangData=app.GetMojangDataForXuid(OnlineXuid);
230 }
231
232 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() )
233 {
234 Minecraft::GetInstance()->progressRenderer->progressStagePercentage((eCCLoginReceived * 100)/ (eCCConnected));
235 }
236
237 // 4J-PB - load the local player skin (from the global title user storage area) if there is one
238 // the primary player on the host machine won't have a qnet player from the socket
239 INetworkPlayer *networkPlayer = connection->getSocket()->getPlayer();
240 int iUserID=-1;
241
242 if( m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() )
243 {
244 iUserID=m_userIndex;
245
246 TelemetryManager->SetMultiplayerInstanceId(packet->m_multiplayerInstanceId);
247 }
248 else
249 {
250 if(!networkPlayer->IsGuest() && networkPlayer->IsLocal())
251 {
252 // find the pad number of this local player
253 for(int i=0;i<XUSER_MAX_COUNT;i++)
254 {
255 INetworkPlayer *networkLocalPlayer=g_NetworkManager.GetLocalPlayerByUserIndex(i);
256 if(networkLocalPlayer==networkPlayer)
257 {
258 iUserID=i;
259 }
260 }
261 }
262 }
263
264 if(iUserID!=-1)
265 {
266 BYTE *pBuffer=nullptr;
267 DWORD dwSize=0;
268 bool bRes;
269
270 // if there's a special skin or cloak for this player, add it in
271 if(pMojangData)
272 {
273 // a skin?
274 if(pMojangData->wchSkin[0]!=0L)
275 {
276 wstring wstr=pMojangData->wchSkin;
277 // check the file is not already in
278 bRes=app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(wstr);
279 if(!bRes)
280 {
281#ifdef _XBOX
282 C4JStorage::ETMSStatus eTMSStatus;
283 eTMSStatus=StorageManager.ReadTMSFile(iUserID,C4JStorage::eGlobalStorage_Title,C4JStorage::eTMS_FileType_Graphic,pMojangData->wchSkin,&pBuffer, &dwSize);
284
285 bRes=(eTMSStatus==C4JStorage::ETMSStatus_Idle);
286#endif
287 }
288
289 if(bRes)
290 {
291 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(wstr,pBuffer,dwSize);
292 }
293 }
294
295 // a cloak?
296 if(pMojangData->wchCape[0]!=0L)
297 {
298 wstring wstr=pMojangData->wchCape;
299 // check the file is not already in
300 bRes=app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(wstr);
301 if(!bRes)
302 {
303#ifdef _XBOX
304 C4JStorage::ETMSStatus eTMSStatus;
305 eTMSStatus=StorageManager.ReadTMSFile(iUserID,C4JStorage::eGlobalStorage_Title,C4JStorage::eTMS_FileType_Graphic,pMojangData->wchCape,&pBuffer, &dwSize);
306 bRes=(eTMSStatus==C4JStorage::ETMSStatus_Idle);
307#endif
308 }
309
310 if(bRes)
311 {
312 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(wstr,pBuffer,dwSize);
313 }
314 }
315 }
316
317 // If we're online, read the banned game list
318 app.ReadBannedList(iUserID);
319 // mark the level as not checked against banned levels - it'll be checked once the level starts
320 app.SetBanListCheck(iUserID,false);
321 }
322
323 if( m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() )
324 {
325 if( app.GetTutorialMode() )
326 {
327 minecraft->gameMode = new FullTutorialMode(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), minecraft, this);
328 }
329 // check if we're in the trial version
330 else if(ProfileManager.IsFullVersion()==false)
331 {
332 minecraft->gameMode = new TrialMode(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), minecraft, this);
333 }
334 else
335 {
336 MemSect(13);
337 minecraft->gameMode = new ConsoleGameMode(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), minecraft, this);
338 MemSect(0);
339 }
340
341
342 Level *dimensionLevel = minecraft->getLevel( packet->dimension );
343 if( dimensionLevel == nullptr )
344 {
345 level = new MultiPlayerLevel(this, new LevelSettings(packet->seed, GameType::byId(packet->gameType), false, false, packet->m_newSeaLevel, packet->m_pLevelType, packet->m_xzSize, packet->m_hellScale), packet->dimension, packet->difficulty);
346
347 // 4J Stu - We want to share the SavedDataStorage between levels
348 int otherDimensionId = packet->dimension == 0 ? -1 : 0;
349 Level *activeLevel = minecraft->getLevel(otherDimensionId);
350 if( activeLevel != nullptr )
351 {
352 // Don't need to delete it here as it belongs to a client connection while will delete it when it's done
353 //if( level->savedDataStorage != nullptr ) delete level->savedDataStorage;
354 level->savedDataStorage = activeLevel->savedDataStorage;
355 }
356
357 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection - DIFFICULTY --- %d\n",packet->difficulty);
358 level->difficulty = packet->difficulty; // 4J Added
359 level->isClientSide = true;
360 minecraft->setLevel(level);
361 }
362 else
363 {
364 level = (MultiPlayerLevel *)dimensionLevel;
365 }
366
367 minecraft->player->setPlayerIndex( packet->m_playerIndex );
368 minecraft->player->setCustomSkin( app.GetPlayerSkinId(m_userIndex) );
369 minecraft->player->setCustomCape( app.GetPlayerCapeId(m_userIndex) );
370
371
372 minecraft->createPrimaryLocalPlayer(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad());
373
374 minecraft->player->dimension = packet->dimension;
375 //minecraft->setScreen(new ReceivingLevelScreen(this));
376 minecraft->player->entityId = packet->clientVersion;
377
378 BYTE networkSmallId = getSocket()->getSmallId();
379 app.UpdatePlayerInfo(networkSmallId, packet->m_playerIndex, packet->m_uiGamePrivileges);
380 minecraft->player->setPlayerGamePrivilege(Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_All, packet->m_uiGamePrivileges);
381
382 // Assume all privileges are on, so that the first message we see only indicates things that have been turned off
383 unsigned int startingPrivileges = 0;
384 Player::enableAllPlayerPrivileges(startingPrivileges,true);
385
386 if(networkPlayer->IsHost())
387 {
388 Player::setPlayerGamePrivilege(startingPrivileges, Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_HOST,1);
389 }
390
391 displayPrivilegeChanges(minecraft->player,startingPrivileges);
392
393 // update the debugoptions
394 app.SetGameSettingsDebugMask(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(-1,true));
395 }
396 else
397 {
398 // 4J-PB - this isn't the level we want
399 //level = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->level;
400 level = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->getLevel( packet->dimension );
401 shared_ptr<Player> player;
402
403 if(level==nullptr)
404 {
405 int otherDimensionId = packet->dimension == 0 ? -1 : 0;
406 MultiPlayerLevel *activeLevel = minecraft->getLevel(otherDimensionId);
407
408 if(activeLevel == nullptr)
409 {
410 otherDimensionId = packet->dimension == 0 ? 1 : (packet->dimension == -1 ? 1 : -1);
411 activeLevel = minecraft->getLevel(otherDimensionId);
412 }
413
414 MultiPlayerLevel *dimensionLevel = new MultiPlayerLevel(this, new LevelSettings(packet->seed, GameType::byId(packet->gameType), false, false, packet->m_newSeaLevel, packet->m_pLevelType, packet->m_xzSize, packet->m_hellScale), packet->dimension, packet->difficulty);
415
416 dimensionLevel->savedDataStorage = activeLevel->savedDataStorage;
417
418 dimensionLevel->difficulty = packet->difficulty; // 4J Added
419 dimensionLevel->isClientSide = true;
420 level = dimensionLevel;
421 // 4J Stu - At time of writing ProfileManager.GetGamertag() does not always return the correct name,
422 // if sign-ins are turned off while the player signed in. Using the qnetPlayer instead.
423 // need to have a level before create extra local player
424 MultiPlayerLevel *levelpassedin=(MultiPlayerLevel *)level;
425 player = minecraft->createExtraLocalPlayer(m_userIndex, networkPlayer->GetOnlineName(), m_userIndex, packet->dimension, this,levelpassedin);
426
427 // need to have a player before the setlevel
428 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> lastPlayer = minecraft->player;
429 minecraft->player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
430 minecraft->setLevel(level);
431 minecraft->player = lastPlayer;
432 }
433 else
434 {
435 player = minecraft->createExtraLocalPlayer(m_userIndex, networkPlayer->GetOnlineName(), m_userIndex, packet->dimension, this);
436 }
437
438
439 //level->addClientConnection( this );
440 player->dimension = packet->dimension;
441 player->entityId = packet->clientVersion;
442
443 player->setPlayerIndex( packet->m_playerIndex );
444 player->setCustomSkin( app.GetPlayerSkinId(m_userIndex) );
445 player->setCustomCape( app.GetPlayerCapeId(m_userIndex) );
446
447
448 BYTE networkSmallId = getSocket()->getSmallId();
449 app.UpdatePlayerInfo(networkSmallId, packet->m_playerIndex, packet->m_uiGamePrivileges);
450 player->setPlayerGamePrivilege(Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_All, packet->m_uiGamePrivileges);
451
452 // Assume all privileges are on, so that the first message we see only indicates things that have been turned off
453 unsigned int startingPrivileges = 0;
454 Player::enableAllPlayerPrivileges(startingPrivileges,true);
455
456 displayPrivilegeChanges(minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex],startingPrivileges);
457 }
458
459 maxPlayers = packet->maxPlayers;
460
461 // need to have a player before the setLocalCreativeMode
462 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> lastPlayer = minecraft->player;
463 minecraft->player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
464 ((MultiPlayerGameMode *)minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex])->setLocalMode(GameType::byId(packet->gameType));
465 minecraft->player = lastPlayer;
466
467 // make sure the UI offsets for this player are set correctly
468 if(iUserID!=-1)
469 {
470 ui.UpdateSelectedItemPos(iUserID);
471 }
472
473 TelemetryManager->RecordLevelStart(m_userIndex, eSen_FriendOrMatch_Playing_With_Invited_Friends, eSen_CompeteOrCoop_Coop_and_Competitive, Minecraft::GetInstance()->getLevel(packet->dimension)->difficulty, app.GetLocalPlayerCount(), g_NetworkManager.GetOnlinePlayerCount());
474}
475
476void ClientConnection::handleAddEntity(shared_ptr<AddEntityPacket> packet)
477{
478 double x = packet->x / 32.0;
479 double y = packet->y / 32.0;
480 double z = packet->z / 32.0;
481 shared_ptr<Entity> e;
482 bool setRot = true;
483
484 // 4J-PB - replacing this massive if nest with switch
485 switch(packet->type)
486 {
487 case AddEntityPacket::MINECART:
488 e = Minecart::createMinecart(level, x, y, z, packet->data);
489 break;
490 case AddEntityPacket::FISH_HOOK:
491 {
492 // 4J Stu - Brought forward from 1.4 to be able to drop XP from fishing
493 shared_ptr<Entity> owner = getEntity(packet->data);
494
495 // 4J - check all local players to find match
496 if( owner == nullptr )
497 {
498 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
499 {
500 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
501 {
502 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->data )
503 {
504
505 owner = minecraft->localplayers[i];
506 break;
507 }
508 }
509 }
510 }
511
512 if (owner != nullptr && owner->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
513 {
514 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(owner);
515 shared_ptr<FishingHook> hook = std::make_shared<FishingHook>(level, x, y, z, player);
516 e = hook;
517 // 4J Stu - Move the player->fishing out of the ctor as we cannot reference 'this'
518 player->fishing = hook;
519 }
520 packet->data = 0;
521 }
522 break;
523 case AddEntityPacket::ARROW:
524 e = std::make_shared<Arrow>(level, x, y, z);
525 break;
526 case AddEntityPacket::SNOWBALL:
527 e = std::make_shared<Snowball>(level, x, y, z);
528 break;
529 case AddEntityPacket::ITEM_FRAME:
530 {
531 int ix=(int) x;
532 int iy=(int) y;
533 int iz = (int) z;
534 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection ITEM_FRAME xyz %d,%d,%d\n",ix,iy,iz);
535 }
536 e = std::make_shared<ItemFrame>(level, (int)x, (int)y, (int)z, packet->data);
537 packet->data = 0;
538 setRot = false;
539 break;
540 case AddEntityPacket::THROWN_ENDERPEARL:
541 e = std::make_shared<ThrownEnderpearl>(level, x, y, z);
542 break;
543 case AddEntityPacket::EYEOFENDERSIGNAL:
544 e = std::make_shared<EyeOfEnderSignal>(level, x, y, z);
545 break;
546 case AddEntityPacket::FIREBALL:
547 e = std::make_shared<LargeFireball>(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
548 packet->data = 0;
549 break;
550 case AddEntityPacket::SMALL_FIREBALL:
551 e = std::make_shared<SmallFireball>(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
552 packet->data = 0;
553 break;
554 case AddEntityPacket::DRAGON_FIRE_BALL:
555 e = std::make_shared<DragonFireball>(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
556 packet->data = 0;
557 break;
558 case AddEntityPacket::EGG:
559 e = std::make_shared<ThrownEgg>(level, x, y, z);
560 break;
561 case AddEntityPacket::THROWN_POTION:
562 e = std::make_shared<ThrownPotion>(level, x, y, z, packet->data);
563 packet->data = 0;
564 break;
565 case AddEntityPacket::THROWN_EXPBOTTLE:
566 e = std::make_shared<ThrownExpBottle>(level, x, y, z);
567 packet->data = 0;
568 break;
569 case AddEntityPacket::BOAT:
570 e = std::make_shared<Boat>(level, x, y, z);
571 break;
572 case AddEntityPacket::PRIMED_TNT:
573 e = std::make_shared<PrimedTnt>(level, x, y, z, std::shared_ptr<LivingEntity>());
574 break;
575 case AddEntityPacket::ENDER_CRYSTAL:
576 e = std::make_shared<EnderCrystal>(level, x, y, z);
577 break;
578 case AddEntityPacket::ITEM:
579 e = std::make_shared<ItemEntity>(level, x, y, z);
580 break;
581 case AddEntityPacket::FALLING:
582 e = std::make_shared<FallingTile>(level, x, y, z, packet->data & 0xFFFF, packet->data >> 16);
583 packet->data = 0;
584 break;
585 case AddEntityPacket::WITHER_SKULL:
586 e = std::make_shared<WitherSkull>(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
587 packet->data = 0;
588 break;
589 case AddEntityPacket::FIREWORKS:
590 e = std::make_shared<FireworksRocketEntity>(level, x, y, z, std::shared_ptr<ItemInstance>());
591 break;
592 case AddEntityPacket::LEASH_KNOT:
593 e = std::make_shared<LeashFenceKnotEntity>(level, (int)x, (int)y, (int)z);
594 packet->data = 0;
595 break;
596#ifndef _FINAL_BUILD
597 default:
598 // Not a known entity (?)
599 assert(0);
600#endif
601 }
602
603 /* if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::MINECART_RIDEABLE) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Minecart(level, x, y, z, Minecart::RIDEABLE) );
604 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::MINECART_CHEST) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Minecart(level, x, y, z, Minecart::CHEST) );
605 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::MINECART_FURNACE) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Minecart(level, x, y, z, Minecart::FURNACE) );
606 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::FISH_HOOK)
607 {
608 // 4J Stu - Brought forward from 1.4 to be able to drop XP from fishing
609 shared_ptr<Entity> owner = getEntity(packet->data);
610
611 // 4J - check all local players to find match
612 if( owner == nullptr )
613 {
614 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
615 {
616 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
617 {
618 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->data )
619 {
620
621 owner = minecraft->localplayers[i];
622 break;
623 }
624 }
625 }
626 }
627 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(owner);
628 if (player != nullptr)
629 {
630 shared_ptr<FishingHook> hook = shared_ptr<FishingHook>( new FishingHook(level, x, y, z, player) );
631 e = hook;
632 // 4J Stu - Move the player->fishing out of the ctor as we cannot reference 'this'
633 player->fishing = hook;
634 }
635 packet->data = 0;
636 }
637
638 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::ARROW) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Arrow(level, x, y, z) );
639 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::SNOWBALL) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Snowball(level, x, y, z) );
640 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::THROWN_ENDERPEARL) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new ThrownEnderpearl(level, x, y, z) );
641 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::EYEOFENDERSIGNAL) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new EyeOfEnderSignal(level, x, y, z) );
642 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::FIREBALL)
643 {
644 e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Fireball(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0) );
645 packet->data = 0;
646 }
647 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::SMALL_FIREBALL)
648 {
649 e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new SmallFireball(level, x, y, z, packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0) );
650 packet->data = 0;
651 }
652 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::EGG) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new ThrownEgg(level, x, y, z) );
653 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::THROWN_POTION)
654 {
655 e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new ThrownPotion(level, x, y, z, packet->data) );
656 packet->data = 0;
657 }
658 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::THROWN_EXPBOTTLE)
659 {
660 e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new ThrownExpBottle(level, x, y, z) );
661 packet->data = 0;
662 }
663 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::BOAT) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new Boat(level, x, y, z) );
664 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::PRIMED_TNT) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new PrimedTnt(level, x, y, z) );
665 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::ENDER_CRYSTAL) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new EnderCrystal(level, x, y, z) );
666 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::FALLING_SAND) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new FallingTile(level, x, y, z, Tile::sand->id) );
667 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::FALLING_GRAVEL) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new FallingTile(level, x, y, z, Tile::gravel->id) );
668 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::FALLING_EGG) e = shared_ptr<Entity>( new FallingTile(level, x, y, z, Tile::dragonEgg_Id) );
669
670 */
671
672 if (e != nullptr)
673 {
674 e->xp = packet->x;
675 e->yp = packet->y;
676 e->zp = packet->z;
677
678 float yRot = packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f;
679 float xRot = packet->xRot * 360 / 256.0f;
680 e->yRotp = packet->yRot;
681 e->xRotp = packet->xRot;
682
683 if (setRot)
684 {
685 e->yRot = 0.0f;
686 e->xRot = 0.0f;
687 }
688
689 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *subEntities = e->getSubEntities();
690 if (subEntities)
691 {
692 int offs = packet->id - e->entityId;
693 for ( auto it : *subEntities )
694 {
695 it->entityId += offs;
696 }
697 }
698
699 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::LEASH_KNOT)
700 {
701 // 4J: "Move" leash knot to it's current position, this sets old position (like frame, leash has adjusted position)
702 e->absMoveTo(e->x, e->y, e->z, yRot, xRot);
703 }
704 else if(packet->type == AddEntityPacket::ITEM_FRAME)
705 {
706 // Not doing this move for frame, as the ctor for these objects does some adjustments on the position based on direction to move the object out slightly from what it is attached to, and this just overwrites it
707 }
708 else
709 {
710 // For everything else, set position
711 e->absMoveTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot);
712 }
713 e->entityId = packet->id;
714 level->putEntity(packet->id, e);
715 m_trackedEntityIds.insert(packet->id);
716
717 if (packet->data > -1) // 4J - changed "no data" value to be -1, we can have a valid entity id of 0
718 {
719
720 if (packet->type == AddEntityPacket::ARROW)
721 {
722 shared_ptr<Entity> owner = getEntity(packet->data);
723
724 // 4J - check all local players to find match
725 if( owner == nullptr )
726 {
727 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
728 {
729 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
730 {
731 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->data )
732 {
733 owner = minecraft->localplayers[i];
734 break;
735 }
736 }
737 }
738 }
739
740 if ( owner != nullptr && owner->instanceof(eTYPE_LIVINGENTITY) )
741 {
742 dynamic_pointer_cast<Arrow>(e)->owner = dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(owner);
743 }
744 }
745
746 e->lerpMotion(packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
747 }
748
749 // 4J: Check our deferred entity link packets
750 checkDeferredEntityLinkPackets(e->entityId);
751 }
752}
753
754void ClientConnection::handleAddExperienceOrb(shared_ptr<AddExperienceOrbPacket> packet)
755{
756 shared_ptr<Entity> e = std::make_shared<ExperienceOrb>(level, packet->x / 32.0, packet->y / 32.0, packet->z / 32.0, packet->value);
757 e->xp = packet->x;
758 e->yp = packet->y;
759 e->zp = packet->z;
760 e->yRot = 0;
761 e->xRot = 0;
762 e->entityId = packet->id;
763 level->putEntity(packet->id, e);
764 m_trackedEntityIds.insert(packet->id);
765}
766
767void ClientConnection::handleAddGlobalEntity(shared_ptr<AddGlobalEntityPacket> packet)
768{
769 if (!isPrimaryConnection()) return;
770 double x = packet->x / 32.0;
771 double y = packet->y / 32.0;
772 double z = packet->z / 32.0;
773 shared_ptr<Entity> e;// = nullptr;
774 if (packet->type == AddGlobalEntityPacket::LIGHTNING) e = std::make_shared<LightningBolt>(level, x, y, z);
775 if (e != nullptr)
776 {
777 e->xp = packet->x;
778 e->yp = packet->y;
779 e->zp = packet->z;
780 e->yRot = 0;
781 e->xRot = 0;
782 e->entityId = packet->id;
783 level->addGlobalEntity(e);
784 }
785}
786
787void ClientConnection::handleAddPainting(shared_ptr<AddPaintingPacket> packet)
788{
789 shared_ptr<Painting> painting = std::make_shared<Painting>(level, packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->dir, packet->motive);
790 level->putEntity(packet->id, painting);
791 m_trackedEntityIds.insert(packet->id);
792}
793
794void ClientConnection::handleSetEntityMotion(shared_ptr<SetEntityMotionPacket> packet)
795{
796 if (!shouldProcessForEntity(packet->id))
797 {
798 if (minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex] == NULL ||
799 packet->id != minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->entityId)
800 return;
801 }
802 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
803 if (e == nullptr) return;
804 e->lerpMotion(packet->xa / 8000.0, packet->ya / 8000.0, packet->za / 8000.0);
805}
806
807void ClientConnection::handleSetEntityData(shared_ptr<SetEntityDataPacket> packet)
808{
809 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
810 if (e != nullptr && packet->getUnpackedData() != nullptr)
811 {
812 e->getEntityData()->assignValues(packet->getUnpackedData());
813 }
814}
815
816void ClientConnection::handleAddPlayer(shared_ptr<AddPlayerPacket> packet)
817{
818 // Some remote players could actually be local players that are already added
819 for(unsigned int idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
820 {
821 // need to use the XUID here
822 PlayerUID playerXUIDOnline = INVALID_XUID, playerXUIDOffline = INVALID_XUID;
823 ProfileManager.GetXUID(idx,&playerXUIDOnline,true);
824 ProfileManager.GetXUID(idx,&playerXUIDOffline,false);
825 if( (playerXUIDOnline != INVALID_XUID && ProfileManager.AreXUIDSEqual(playerXUIDOnline,packet->xuid) ) ||
826 (playerXUIDOffline != INVALID_XUID && ProfileManager.AreXUIDSEqual(playerXUIDOffline,packet->xuid) ) )
827 {
828 app.DebugPrintf("AddPlayerPacket received with XUID of local player\n");
829 return;
830 }
831 }
832#ifdef _WINDOWS64
833 // Win64 keeps local-player identity separate from network smallId; also guard against creating
834 // a duplicate remote player for a local slot by checking the username directly.
835 for (unsigned int idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
836 {
837 if (minecraft->localplayers[idx] != nullptr && minecraft->localplayers[idx]->name == packet->name)
838 {
839 app.DebugPrintf("AddPlayerPacket received for local player name %ls\n", packet->name.c_str());
840 return;
841 }
842 }
843#endif
844/*#ifdef _WINDOWS64
845 // On Windows64 all XUIDs are INVALID_XUID so the XUID check above never fires.
846 // packet->m_playerIndex is the server-assigned sequential index (set via LoginPacket),
847 // NOT the controller slot — so we must scan all local player slots and match by
848 // their stored server index rather than using it directly as an array subscript.
849 for(unsigned int idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
850 {
851 if(minecraft->localplayers[idx] != nullptr &&
852 minecraft->localplayers[idx]->getPlayerIndex() == packet->m_playerIndex)
853 {
854 app.DebugPrintf("AddPlayerPacket received for local player (controller %d, server index %d), skipping RemotePlayer creation\n", idx, packet->m_playerIndex);
855 return;
856 }
857 }
858#endif*/
859
860 double x = packet->x / 32.0;
861 double y = packet->y / 32.0;
862 double z = packet->z / 32.0;
863 float yRot = packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f;
864 float xRot = packet->xRot * 360 / 256.0f;
865 shared_ptr<RemotePlayer> player = std::make_shared<RemotePlayer>(minecraft->level, packet->name);
866 player->xo = player->xOld = player->xp = packet->x;
867 player->yo = player->yOld = player->yp = packet->y;
868 player->zo = player->zOld = player->zp = packet->z;
869 player->xRotp = packet->xRot;
870 player->yRotp = packet->yRot;
871 player->yHeadRot = packet->yHeadRot * 360 / 256.0f;
872 player->setXuid(packet->xuid);
873
874#ifdef _DURANGO
875 // On Durango request player display name from network manager
876 INetworkPlayer *networkPlayer = g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerByXuid(player->getXuid());
877 if (networkPlayer != nullptr) player->m_displayName = networkPlayer->GetDisplayName();
878#else
879 // On all other platforms display name is just gamertag so don't check with the network manager
880 player->m_displayName = player->getName();
881#endif
882
883#ifdef _WINDOWS64
884 {
885 IQNetPlayer* matchedQNetPlayer = nullptr;
886 PlayerUID pktXuid = player->getXuid();
887 const PlayerUID WIN64_XUID_BASE = (PlayerUID)0xe000d45248242f2e;
888 // Legacy compatibility path for peers still using embedded smallId XUIDs.
889 if (pktXuid >= WIN64_XUID_BASE && pktXuid < WIN64_XUID_BASE + MINECRAFT_NET_MAX_PLAYERS)
890 {
891 BYTE smallId = (BYTE)(pktXuid - WIN64_XUID_BASE);
892 INetworkPlayer* np = g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerBySmallId(smallId);
893 if (np != nullptr)
894 {
895 NetworkPlayerXbox* npx = (NetworkPlayerXbox*)np;
896 matchedQNetPlayer = npx->GetQNetPlayer();
897 }
898 }
899
900 // Current Win64 path: identify QNet player by name and attach packet XUID.
901 if (matchedQNetPlayer == nullptr)
902 {
903 for (int i = 0; i < MINECRAFT_NET_MAX_PLAYERS; ++i)
904 {
905 BYTE smallId = static_cast<BYTE>(i);
906 INetworkPlayer* np = g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerBySmallId(smallId);
907 if (np == nullptr)
908 continue;
909
910 NetworkPlayerXbox* npx = (NetworkPlayerXbox*)np;
911 IQNetPlayer* qp = npx->GetQNetPlayer();
912 if (qp != nullptr && _wcsicmp(qp->m_gamertag, packet->name.c_str()) == 0)
913 {
914 matchedQNetPlayer = qp;
915 break;
916 }
917 }
918 }
919
920 if (matchedQNetPlayer != nullptr)
921 {
922 // Store packet-authoritative XUID on this network slot so later lookups by XUID
923 // (e.g. remove player, display mapping) work for both legacy and uid.dat clients.
924 matchedQNetPlayer->m_resolvedXuid = pktXuid;
925 if (matchedQNetPlayer->m_gamertag[0] == 0)
926 {
927 wcsncpy_s(matchedQNetPlayer->m_gamertag, 32, packet->name.c_str(), _TRUNCATE);
928 }
929 }
930 }
931#endif
932
933 // printf("\t\t\t\t%d: Add player\n",packet->id,packet->yRot);
934
935 int item = packet->carriedItem;
936 if (item == 0)
937 {
938 player->inventory->items[player->inventory->selected] = shared_ptr<ItemInstance>(); // nullptr;
939 }
940 else
941 {
942 player->inventory->items[player->inventory->selected] = std::make_shared<ItemInstance>(item, 1, 0);
943 }
944 player->absMoveTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot);
945
946 player->setPlayerIndex( packet->m_playerIndex );
947 player->setCustomSkin( packet->m_skinId );
948 player->setCustomCape( packet->m_capeId );
949 player->setPlayerGamePrivilege(Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_All, packet->m_uiGamePrivileges);
950
951 if (!player->customTextureUrl.empty() && player->customTextureUrl.substr(0, 3).compare(L"def") != 0 && !app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(player->customTextureUrl))
952 {
953 if (minecraft->addPendingClientTextureRequest(player->customTextureUrl))
954 {
955 app.DebugPrintf("Client sending TextureAndGeometryPacket to get custom skin %ls for player %ls\n", player->customTextureUrl.c_str(), player->name.c_str());
956
957 send(std::make_shared<TextureAndGeometryPacket>(
958 player->customTextureUrl,
959 nullptr,
960 static_cast<DWORD>(0)));
961 }
962 }
963 else if(!player->customTextureUrl.empty() && app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(player->customTextureUrl))
964 {
965 // Update the ref count on the memory texture data
966 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(player->customTextureUrl,nullptr,0);
967 }
968
969 app.DebugPrintf("Custom skin for player %ls is %ls\n",player->name.c_str(),player->customTextureUrl.c_str());
970
971 if(!player->customTextureUrl2.empty() && player->customTextureUrl2.substr(0,3).compare(L"def") != 0 && !app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(player->customTextureUrl2))
972 {
973 if( minecraft->addPendingClientTextureRequest(player->customTextureUrl2) )
974 {
975 app.DebugPrintf("Client sending texture packet to get custom cape %ls for player %ls\n",player->customTextureUrl2.c_str(), player->name.c_str());
976 send(std::make_shared<TexturePacket>(
977 player->customTextureUrl2,
978 nullptr,
979 static_cast<DWORD>(0)
980 ));
981 }
982 }
983 else if(!player->customTextureUrl2.empty() && app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(player->customTextureUrl2))
984 {
985 // Update the ref count on the memory texture data
986 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(player->customTextureUrl2,nullptr,0);
987 }
988
989 app.DebugPrintf("Custom cape for player %ls is %ls\n",player->name.c_str(),player->customTextureUrl2.c_str());
990
991 level->putEntity(packet->id, player);
992 m_trackedEntityIds.insert(packet->id);
993
994 vector<shared_ptr<SynchedEntityData::DataItem> > *unpackedData = packet->getUnpackedData();
995 if (unpackedData != nullptr)
996 {
997 player->getEntityData()->assignValues(unpackedData);
998 }
999
1000}
1001
1002void ClientConnection::handleTeleportEntity(shared_ptr<TeleportEntityPacket> packet)
1003{
1004 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1005 if (e == nullptr) return;
1006 e->xp = packet->x;
1007 e->yp = packet->y;
1008 e->zp = packet->z;
1009 double x = e->xp / 32.0;
1010 double y = e->yp / 32.0 + 1 / 64.0f;
1011 double z = e->zp / 32.0;
1012 // 4J - make sure xRot stays within -90 -> 90 range
1013 int ixRot = packet->xRot;
1014 if( ixRot >= 128 ) ixRot -= 256;
1015 float yRot = packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f;
1016 float xRot = ixRot * 360 / 256.0f;
1017 e->yRotp = packet->yRot;
1018 e->xRotp = ixRot;
1019
1020// printf("\t\t\t\t%d: Teleport to %d (lerp to %f)\n",packet->id,packet->yRot,yRot);
1021 e->lerpTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot, 3);
1022}
1023
1024void ClientConnection::handleSetCarriedItem(shared_ptr<SetCarriedItemPacket> packet)
1025{
1026 if (packet->slot >= 0 && packet->slot < Inventory::getSelectionSize()) {
1027 Minecraft::GetInstance()->localplayers[m_userIndex].get()->inventory->selected = packet->slot;
1028 }
1029}
1030
1031void ClientConnection::handleMoveEntity(shared_ptr<MoveEntityPacket> packet)
1032{
1033 if (!shouldProcessForEntity(packet->id)) return;
1034 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1035 if (e == nullptr) return;
1036 e->xp += packet->xa;
1037 e->yp += packet->ya;
1038 e->zp += packet->za;
1039 double x = e->xp / 32.0;
1040 // 4J - The original code did not add the 1/64.0f like the teleport above did, which caused minecarts to fall through the ground
1041 double y = e->yp / 32.0 + 1 / 64.0f;
1042 double z = e->zp / 32.0;
1043 // 4J - have changed rotation to be relative here too
1044 e->yRotp += packet->yRot;
1045 e->xRotp += packet->xRot;
1046 float yRot = ( e->yRotp * 360 ) / 256.0f;
1047 float xRot = ( e->xRotp * 360 ) / 256.0f;
1048// float yRot = packet->hasRot ? packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f : e->yRot;
1049// float xRot = packet->hasRot ? packet->xRot * 360 / 256.0f : e->xRot;
1050 e->lerpTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot, 3);
1051}
1052
1053void ClientConnection::handleRotateMob(shared_ptr<RotateHeadPacket> packet)
1054{
1055 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1056 if (e == nullptr) return;
1057 float yHeadRot = packet->yHeadRot * 360 / 256.f;
1058 e->setYHeadRot(yHeadRot);
1059}
1060
1061void ClientConnection::handleMoveEntitySmall(shared_ptr<MoveEntityPacketSmall> packet)
1062{
1063 if (!shouldProcessForEntity(packet->id)) return;
1064 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1065 if (e == nullptr) return;
1066 e->xp += packet->xa;
1067 e->yp += packet->ya;
1068 e->zp += packet->za;
1069 double x = e->xp / 32.0;
1070 // 4J - The original code did not add the 1/64.0f like the teleport above did, which caused minecarts to fall through the ground
1071 double y = e->yp / 32.0 + 1 / 64.0f;
1072 double z = e->zp / 32.0;
1073 // 4J - have changed rotation to be relative here too
1074 e->yRotp += packet->yRot;
1075 e->xRotp += packet->xRot;
1076 float yRot = ( e->yRotp * 360 ) / 256.0f;
1077 float xRot = ( e->xRotp * 360 ) / 256.0f;
1078// float yRot = packet->hasRot ? packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f : e->yRot;
1079// float xRot = packet->hasRot ? packet->xRot * 360 / 256.0f : e->xRot;
1080 e->lerpTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot, 3);
1081}
1082
1083void ClientConnection::handleRemoveEntity(shared_ptr<RemoveEntitiesPacket> packet)
1084{
1085#ifdef _WINDOWS64
1086 if (!g_NetworkManager.IsHost())
1087 {
1088 for (int i = 0; i < packet->ids.length; i++)
1089 {
1090 shared_ptr<Entity> entity = getEntity(packet->ids[i]);
1091 if (entity != nullptr && entity->GetType() == eTYPE_PLAYER)
1092 {
1093 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(entity);
1094 if (player != nullptr)
1095 {
1096 PlayerUID xuid = player->getXuid();
1097 INetworkPlayer* np = g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerByXuid(xuid);
1098 if (np != nullptr)
1099 {
1100 NetworkPlayerXbox* npx = (NetworkPlayerXbox*)np;
1101 IQNetPlayer* qp = npx->GetQNetPlayer();
1102 if (qp != nullptr)
1103 {
1104 extern CPlatformNetworkManagerStub* g_pPlatformNetworkManager;
1105 g_pPlatformNetworkManager->NotifyPlayerLeaving(qp);
1106 qp->m_smallId = 0;
1107 qp->m_isRemote = false;
1108 qp->m_isHostPlayer = false;
1109 // Clear resolved id to avoid stale XUID -> player matches after disconnect.
1110 qp->m_resolvedXuid = INVALID_XUID;
1111 qp->m_gamertag[0] = 0;
1112 qp->SetCustomDataValue(0);
1113 }
1114 }
1115 }
1116 }
1117 }
1118 }
1119#endif
1120 for (int i = 0; i < packet->ids.length; i++)
1121 {
1122 m_trackedEntityIds.erase(packet->ids[i]);
1123 level->removeEntity(packet->ids[i]);
1124 }
1125}
1126
1127void ClientConnection::handleMovePlayer(shared_ptr<MovePlayerPacket> packet)
1128{
1129 shared_ptr<Player> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]; //minecraft->player;
1130
1131 double x = player->x;
1132 double y = player->y;
1133 double z = player->z;
1134 float yRot = player->yRot;
1135 float xRot = player->xRot;
1136
1137 if (packet->hasPos)
1138 {
1139 x = packet->x;
1140 y = packet->y;
1141 z = packet->z;
1142 }
1143 if (packet->hasRot)
1144 {
1145 yRot = packet->yRot;
1146 xRot = packet->xRot;
1147 }
1148
1149 player->ySlideOffset = 0;
1150 player->xd = player->yd = player->zd = 0;
1151 player->absMoveTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot);
1152 packet->x = player->x;
1153 packet->y = player->bb->y0;
1154 packet->z = player->z;
1155 packet->yView = player->y;
1156 connection->send(packet);
1157 if (!started)
1158 {
1159
1160 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() )
1161 {
1162 Minecraft::GetInstance()->progressRenderer->progressStagePercentage((eCCConnected * 100)/ (eCCConnected));
1163 }
1164 player->xo = player->x;
1165 player->yo = player->y;
1166 player->zo = player->z;
1167 // 4J - added setting xOld/yOld/zOld here too, as otherwise at the start of the game we interpolate the player position from the origin to wherever its first position really is
1168 player->xOld = player->x;
1169 player->yOld = player->y;
1170 player->zOld = player->z;
1171
1172 started = true;
1173 minecraft->setScreen(nullptr);
1174
1175 // Fix for #105852 - TU12: Content: Gameplay: Local splitscreen Players are spawned at incorrect places after re-joining previously saved and loaded "Mass Effect World".
1176 // Move this check from Minecraft::createExtraLocalPlayer
1177 // 4J-PB - can't call this when this function is called from the qnet thread (GetGameStarted will be false)
1178 if(app.GetGameStarted())
1179 {
1180 ui.CloseUIScenes(m_userIndex);
1181 }
1182 }
1183
1184}
1185
1186// 4J Added
1187void ClientConnection::handleChunkVisibilityArea(shared_ptr<ChunkVisibilityAreaPacket> packet)
1188{
1189 if (level == NULL) return;
1190 for(int z = packet->m_minZ; z <= packet->m_maxZ; ++z)
1191 {
1192 for(int x = packet->m_minX; x <= packet->m_maxX; ++x)
1193 {
1194 m_visibleChunks.insert(chunkKey(x, z));
1195 level->setChunkVisible(x, z, true);
1196 }
1197 }
1198}
1199
1200void ClientConnection::handleChunkVisibility(shared_ptr<ChunkVisibilityPacket> packet)
1201{
1202 if (level == NULL) return;
1203 if (packet->visible)
1204 {
1205 m_visibleChunks.insert(chunkKey(packet->x, packet->z));
1206 level->setChunkVisible(packet->x, packet->z, true);
1207 }
1208 else
1209 {
1210 m_visibleChunks.erase(chunkKey(packet->x, packet->z));
1211 if (!anyOtherConnectionHasChunk(packet->x, packet->z))
1212 {
1213 level->setChunkVisible(packet->x, packet->z, false);
1214 }
1215 }
1216}
1217
1218void ClientConnection::handleChunkTilesUpdate(shared_ptr<ChunkTilesUpdatePacket> packet)
1219{
1220 // 4J - changed to encode level in packet
1221 MultiPlayerLevel *dimensionLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->levels[packet->levelIdx];
1222 if( dimensionLevel )
1223 {
1224 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Handle chunk tiles update");
1225 LevelChunk *lc = dimensionLevel->getChunk(packet->xc, packet->zc);
1226 int xo = packet->xc * 16;
1227 int zo = packet->zc * 16;
1228 // 4J Stu - Unshare before we make any changes incase the server is already another step ahead of us
1229 // Fix for #7904 - Gameplay: Players can dupe torches by throwing them repeatedly into water.
1230 // This is quite expensive to do, so only consider unsharing if this tile setting is going to actually
1231 // change something
1232 bool forcedUnshare = false;
1233 for (int i = 0; i < packet->count; i++)
1234 {
1235 int pos = packet->positions[i];
1236 int tile = packet->blocks[i] & 0xff;
1237 int data = packet->data[i];
1238
1239
1240 int x = (pos >> 12) & 15;
1241 int z = (pos >> 8) & 15;
1242 int y = ((pos) & 255);
1243
1244 // If this is going to actually change a tile, we'll need to unshare
1245 int prevTile = lc->getTile(x, y, z);
1246 if( ( tile != prevTile && !forcedUnshare ) )
1247 {
1248 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Chunk data unsharing\n");
1249 dimensionLevel->unshareChunkAt(xo,zo);
1250 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1251 forcedUnshare = true;
1252 }
1253
1254 // 4J - Changes now that lighting is done at the client side of things...
1255 // Note - the java version now calls the doSetTileAndData method from the level here rather than the levelchunk, which ultimately ends up
1256 // calling checkLight for the altered tile. For us this doesn't always work as when sharing tile data between a local server & client, the
1257 // tile might not be considered to be being changed on the client as the server already has changed the shared data, and so the checkLight
1258 // doesn't happen. Hence doing an explicit checkLight here instead.
1259 lc->setTileAndData(x, y, z, tile, data);
1260 dimensionLevel->checkLight(x + xo, y, z + zo);
1261
1262 dimensionLevel->clearResetRegion(x + xo, y, z + zo, x + xo, y, z + zo);
1263
1264 // Don't bother setting this to dirty if it isn't going to visually change - we get a lot of
1265 // water changing from static to dynamic for instance
1266 if(!( ( ( prevTile == Tile::water_Id ) && ( tile == Tile::calmWater_Id ) ) ||
1267 ( ( prevTile == Tile::calmWater_Id ) && ( tile == Tile::water_Id ) ) ||
1268 ( ( prevTile == Tile::lava_Id ) && ( tile == Tile::calmLava_Id ) ) ||
1269 ( ( prevTile == Tile::calmLava_Id ) && ( tile == Tile::calmLava_Id ) ) ||
1270 ( ( prevTile == Tile::calmLava_Id ) && ( tile == Tile::lava_Id ) ) ) )
1271 {
1272 dimensionLevel->setTilesDirty(x + xo, y, z + zo, x + xo, y, z + zo);
1273 }
1274
1275 // 4J - remove any tite entities in this region which are associated with a tile that is now no longer a tile entity. Without doing this we end up with stray
1276 // tile entities kicking round, which leads to a bug where chests can't be properly placed again in a location after (say) a chest being removed by TNT
1277 dimensionLevel->removeUnusedTileEntitiesInRegion(xo + x, y, zo + z, xo + x+1, y+1, zo + z+1);
1278 }
1279 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Chunk data sharing\n");
1280 dimensionLevel->shareChunkAt(xo,zo); // 4J - added - only shares if chunks are same on server & client
1281 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1282
1283 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1284 }
1285}
1286
1287void ClientConnection::handleBlockRegionUpdate(shared_ptr<BlockRegionUpdatePacket> packet)
1288{
1289 // 4J - changed to encode level in packet
1290 MultiPlayerLevel *dimensionLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->levels[packet->levelIdx];
1291 if( dimensionLevel )
1292 {
1293 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Handle block region update");
1294
1295 if(packet->bIsFullChunk && packet->ys == 0)
1296 {
1297 app.DebugPrintf("[BRUP-CLIENT] *** EMPTY FULL CHUNK received at (%d,%d)! Buffer length=%d\n",
1298 packet->x>>4, packet->z>>4, packet->buffer.length);
1299 }
1300
1301 int y1 = packet->y + packet->ys;
1302 if(packet->bIsFullChunk)
1303 {
1304 y1 = Level::maxBuildHeight;
1305
1306 // Ensure the chunk exists in the cache before writing data.
1307 // The ChunkVisibilityAreaPacket that creates chunks can arrive AFTER the first BRUP,
1308 // causing getChunk() to return EmptyLevelChunk (whose setBlocksAndData is a no-op).
1309 dimensionLevel->setChunkVisible(packet->x >> 4, packet->z >> 4, true);
1310
1311 if(packet->buffer.length > 0)
1312 {
1313 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0, "Reordering to XZY");
1314 LevelChunk::reorderBlocksAndDataToXZY(packet->y, packet->xs, packet->ys, packet->zs, &packet->buffer);
1315 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1316 }
1317 }
1318 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Clear rest region");
1319 dimensionLevel->clearResetRegion(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->x + packet->xs - 1, y1 - 1, packet->z + packet->zs - 1);
1320 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1321
1322 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"setBlocksAndData");
1323 // Only full chunks send lighting information now - added flag to end of this call
1324 dimensionLevel->setBlocksAndData(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->xs, packet->ys, packet->zs, packet->buffer, packet->bIsFullChunk);
1325 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1326
1327// OutputDebugString("END BRU\n");
1328
1329 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"removeUnusedTileEntitiesInRegion");
1330 // 4J - remove any tite entities in this region which are associated with a tile that is now no longer a tile entity. Without doing this we end up with stray
1331 // tile entities kicking round, which leads to a bug where chests can't be properly placed again in a location after (say) a chest being removed by TNT
1332 dimensionLevel->removeUnusedTileEntitiesInRegion(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->x + packet->xs, y1, packet->z + packet->zs );
1333 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1334
1335 // If this is a full packet for a chunk, make sure that the cache now considers that it has data for this chunk - this is used to determine whether to bother
1336 // rendering mobs or not, so we don't have them in crazy positions before the data is there
1337 if( packet->bIsFullChunk )
1338 {
1339 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"dateReceivedForChunk");
1340 dimensionLevel->dataReceivedForChunk( packet->x >> 4, packet->z >> 4 );
1341 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1342 }
1343 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1344 }
1345}
1346
1347void ClientConnection::handleTileUpdate(shared_ptr<TileUpdatePacket> packet)
1348{
1349 // 4J added - using a block of 255 to signify that this is a packet for destroying a tile, where we need to inform the level renderer that we are about to do so.
1350 // This is used in creative mode as the point where a tile is first destroyed at the client end of things. Packets formed like this are potentially sent from
1351 // ServerPlayerGameMode::destroyBlock
1352 bool destroyTilePacket = false;
1353 if( packet->block == 255 )
1354 {
1355 packet->block = 0;
1356 destroyTilePacket = true;
1357 }
1358 // 4J - changed to encode level in packet
1359 MultiPlayerLevel *dimensionLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->levels[packet->levelIdx];
1360 if( dimensionLevel )
1361 {
1362 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Handle tile update");
1363
1364 if( g_NetworkManager.IsHost() )
1365 {
1366 // 4J Stu - Unshare before we make any changes incase the server is already another step ahead of us
1367 // Fix for #7904 - Gameplay: Players can dupe torches by throwing them repeatedly into water.
1368 // This is quite expensive to do, so only consider unsharing if this tile setting is going to actually
1369 // change something
1370 int prevTile = dimensionLevel->getTile(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
1371 int prevData = dimensionLevel->getData(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
1372 if( packet->block != prevTile || packet->data != prevData )
1373 {
1374 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Chunk data unsharing\n");
1375 dimensionLevel->unshareChunkAt(packet->x,packet->z);
1376 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1377 }
1378 }
1379
1380 // 4J - In creative mode, we don't update the tile locally then get it confirmed by the server - the first point that we know we are about to destroy a tile is here. Let
1381 // the rendering side of thing know so we can synchronise collision with async render data upates.
1382 if( destroyTilePacket )
1383 {
1384 minecraft->levelRenderer->destroyedTileManager->destroyingTileAt(dimensionLevel, packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
1385 }
1386
1387 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Setting data\n");
1388 bool tileWasSet = dimensionLevel->doSetTileAndData(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->block, packet->data);
1389
1390 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1391
1392 // 4J - remove any tite entities in this region which are associated with a tile that is now no longer a tile entity. Without doing this we end up with stray
1393 // tile entities kicking round, which leads to a bug where chests can't be properly placed again in a location after (say) a chest being removed by TNT
1394 dimensionLevel->removeUnusedTileEntitiesInRegion(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->x+1, packet->y+1, packet->z+1 );
1395
1396 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Sharing data\n");
1397 dimensionLevel->shareChunkAt(packet->x,packet->z); // 4J - added - only shares if chunks are same on server & client
1398 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1399
1400 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1401 }
1402}
1403
1404void ClientConnection::handleDisconnect(shared_ptr<DisconnectPacket> packet)
1405{
1406 connection->close(DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_Kicked);
1407 done = true;
1408
1409 Minecraft *pMinecraft = Minecraft::GetInstance();
1410 pMinecraft->connectionDisconnected( m_userIndex , packet->reason );
1411 app.SetDisconnectReason( packet->reason );
1412
1413 app.SetAction(m_userIndex,eAppAction_ExitWorld,(void *)TRUE);
1414 //minecraft->setLevel(nullptr);
1415 //minecraft->setScreen(new DisconnectedScreen(L"disconnect.disconnected", L"disconnect.genericReason", &packet->reason));
1416
1417}
1418
1419void ClientConnection::onDisconnect(DisconnectPacket::eDisconnectReason reason, void *reasonObjects)
1420{
1421 if (done) return;
1422 done = true;
1423
1424 Minecraft *pMinecraft = Minecraft::GetInstance();
1425 pMinecraft->connectionDisconnected( m_userIndex , reason );
1426
1427 // 4J Stu - TU-1 hotfix
1428 // Fix for #13191 - The host of a game can get a message informing them that the connection to the server has been lost
1429 // In the (now unlikely) event that the host connections times out, allow the player to save their game
1430 if(g_NetworkManager.IsHost() &&
1431 (reason == DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_TimeOut || reason == DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_Overflow) &&
1432 m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() &&
1433 !MinecraftServer::saveOnExitAnswered() )
1434 {
1435 UINT uiIDA[1];
1436 uiIDA[0]=IDS_CONFIRM_OK;
1437 ui.RequestErrorMessage(IDS_EXITING_GAME, IDS_GENERIC_ERROR, uiIDA, 1, ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),&ClientConnection::HostDisconnectReturned,nullptr);
1438 }
1439 else
1440 {
1441 app.SetAction(m_userIndex,eAppAction_ExitWorld,(void *)TRUE);
1442 }
1443
1444 //minecraft->setLevel(nullptr);
1445 //minecraft->setScreen(new DisconnectedScreen(L"disconnect.lost", reason, reasonObjects));
1446}
1447
1448void ClientConnection::sendAndDisconnect(shared_ptr<Packet> packet)
1449{
1450 if (done) return;
1451 connection->send(packet);
1452 connection->sendAndQuit();
1453}
1454
1455void ClientConnection::send(shared_ptr<Packet> packet)
1456{
1457 if (done) return;
1458 connection->send(packet);
1459}
1460
1461void ClientConnection::handleTakeItemEntity(shared_ptr<TakeItemEntityPacket> packet)
1462{
1463 if (!shouldProcessForEntity(packet->itemId)) return;
1464 shared_ptr<Entity> from = getEntity(packet->itemId);
1465 shared_ptr<LivingEntity> to = dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(getEntity(packet->playerId));
1466
1467 // 4J - the original game could assume that if getEntity didn't find the player, it must be the local player. We
1468 // need to search all local players
1469 bool isLocalPlayer = false;
1470 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
1471 {
1472 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
1473 {
1474 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->playerId )
1475 {
1476 isLocalPlayer = true;
1477 to = minecraft->localplayers[i];
1478 break;
1479 }
1480 }
1481 }
1482
1483 if (to == nullptr)
1484 {
1485 // Don't know if this should ever really happen, but seems safest to try and remove the entity that has been collected even if we can't
1486 // create a particle as we don't know what really collected it
1487 level->removeEntity(packet->itemId);
1488 return;
1489 }
1490
1491 if (from != nullptr)
1492 {
1493 // If this is a local player, then we only want to do processing for it if this connection is associated with the player it is for. In
1494 // particular, we don't want to remove the item entity until we are processing it for the right connection, or else we won't have a valid
1495 // "from" reference if we've already removed the item for an earlier processed connection
1496 if( isLocalPlayer )
1497 {
1498 shared_ptr<LocalPlayer> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<LocalPlayer>(to);
1499
1500 // 4J Stu - Fix for #10213 - UI: Local clients cannot progress through the tutorial normally.
1501 // We only send this packet once if many local players can see the event, so make sure we update
1502 // the tutorial for the player that actually picked up the item
1503 int playerPad = player->GetXboxPad();
1504
1505 if( minecraft->localgameModes[playerPad] != nullptr )
1506 {
1507 // 4J-PB - add in the XP orb sound
1508 if(from->GetType() == eTYPE_EXPERIENCEORB)
1509 {
1510 float fPitch=((random->nextFloat() - random->nextFloat()) * 0.7f + 1.0f) * 2.0f;
1511 app.DebugPrintf("XP Orb with pitch %f\n",fPitch);
1512 level->playSound(from, eSoundType_RANDOM_ORB, 0.2f, fPitch);
1513 }
1514 else
1515 {
1516 level->playSound(from, eSoundType_RANDOM_POP, 0.2f, ((random->nextFloat() - random->nextFloat()) * 0.7f + 1.0f) * 2.0f);
1517 }
1518
1519 minecraft->particleEngine->add(std::make_shared<TakeAnimationParticle>(minecraft->level, from, to, -0.5f));
1520 level->removeEntity(packet->itemId);
1521 }
1522 else
1523 {
1524 // Don't know if this should ever really happen, but seems safest to try and remove the entity that has been collected even if it
1525 // somehow isn't an itementity
1526 level->removeEntity(packet->itemId);
1527 }
1528 }
1529 else
1530 {
1531 level->playSound(from, eSoundType_RANDOM_POP, 0.2f, ((random->nextFloat() - random->nextFloat()) * 0.7f + 1.0f) * 2.0f);
1532 minecraft->particleEngine->add(std::make_shared<TakeAnimationParticle>(minecraft->level, from, to, -0.5f));
1533 level->removeEntity(packet->itemId);
1534 }
1535 }
1536
1537}
1538
1539void ClientConnection::handleChat(shared_ptr<ChatPacket> packet)
1540{
1541 wstring message;
1542 int iPos;
1543 bool displayOnGui = true;
1544
1545 bool replacePlayer = false;
1546 bool replaceEntitySource = false;
1547 bool replaceItem = false;
1548
1549 wstring playerDisplayName = L"";
1550 wstring sourceDisplayName = L"";
1551
1552 // On platforms other than Xbox One this just sets display name to gamertag
1553 if (packet->m_stringArgs.size() >= 1) playerDisplayName = GetDisplayNameByGamertag(packet->m_stringArgs[0]);
1554 if (packet->m_stringArgs.size() >= 2) sourceDisplayName = GetDisplayNameByGamertag(packet->m_stringArgs[1]);
1555
1556 switch(packet->m_messageType)
1557 {
1558 case ChatPacket::e_ChatCustom:
1559 message = (packet->m_stringArgs.size() >= 1) ? packet->m_stringArgs[0] : L"";
1560 break;
1561 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedOccupied:
1562 message = app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_OCCUPIED);
1563 break;
1564 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedNoSleep:
1565 message = app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_NO_SLEEP);
1566 break;
1567 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedNotValid:
1568 message = app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_NOT_VALID);
1569 break;
1570 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedNotSafe:
1571 message = app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_NOTSAFE);
1572 break;
1573 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedPlayerSleep:
1574 message=app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_PLAYERSLEEP);
1575 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1576 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1577 break;
1578 case ChatPacket::e_ChatBedMeSleep:
1579 message=app.GetString(IDS_TILE_BED_MESLEEP);
1580 break;
1581 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerJoinedGame:
1582 message=app.GetString(IDS_PLAYER_JOINED);
1583 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1584 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1585 break;
1586 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerLeftGame:
1587 message=app.GetString(IDS_PLAYER_LEFT);
1588 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1589 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1590 break;
1591 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerKickedFromGame:
1592 message=app.GetString(IDS_PLAYER_KICKED);
1593 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1594 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1595 break;
1596 case ChatPacket::e_ChatCannotPlaceLava:
1597 displayOnGui = false;
1598 app.SetGlobalXuiAction(eAppAction_DisplayLavaMessage);
1599 break;
1600 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathInFire:
1601 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_INFIRE);
1602 replacePlayer = true;
1603 break;
1604 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathOnFire:
1605 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_ONFIRE);
1606 replacePlayer = true;
1607 break;
1608 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathLava:
1609 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_LAVA);
1610 replacePlayer = true;
1611 break;
1612 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathInWall:
1613 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_INWALL);
1614 replacePlayer = true;
1615 break;
1616 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathDrown:
1617 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_DROWN);
1618 replacePlayer = true;
1619 break;
1620 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathStarve:
1621 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_STARVE);
1622 replacePlayer = true;
1623 break;
1624 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathCactus:
1625 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_CACTUS);
1626 replacePlayer = true;
1627 break;
1628 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFall:
1629 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FALL);
1630 replacePlayer = true;
1631 break;
1632 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathOutOfWorld:
1633 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_OUTOFWORLD);
1634 replacePlayer = true;
1635 break;
1636 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathGeneric:
1637 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_GENERIC);
1638 replacePlayer = true;
1639 break;
1640 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathExplosion:
1641 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_EXPLOSION);
1642 replacePlayer = true;
1643 break;
1644 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathMagic:
1645 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_MAGIC);
1646 replacePlayer = true;
1647 break;
1648 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathAnvil:
1649 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FALLING_ANVIL);
1650 replacePlayer = true;
1651 break;
1652 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFallingBlock:
1653 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FALLING_TILE);
1654 replacePlayer = true;
1655 break;
1656 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathDragonBreath:
1657 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_DRAGON_BREATH);
1658 replacePlayer = true;
1659 break;
1660 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathMob:
1661 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_MOB);
1662 replacePlayer = true;
1663 replaceEntitySource = true;
1664 break;
1665 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathPlayer:
1666 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_PLAYER);
1667 replacePlayer = true;
1668 replaceEntitySource = true;
1669 break;
1670 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathArrow:
1671 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_ARROW);
1672 replacePlayer = true;
1673 replaceEntitySource = true;
1674 break;
1675 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFireball:
1676 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FIREBALL);
1677 replacePlayer = true;
1678 replaceEntitySource = true;
1679 break;
1680 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathThrown:
1681 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_THROWN);
1682 replacePlayer = true;
1683 replaceEntitySource = true;
1684 break;
1685 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathIndirectMagic:
1686 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_INDIRECT_MAGIC);
1687 replacePlayer = true;
1688 replaceEntitySource = true;
1689 break;
1690 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathThorns:
1691 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_THORNS);
1692 replacePlayer = true;
1693 replaceEntitySource = true;
1694 break;
1695
1696
1697 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAccidentLadder:
1698 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ACCIDENT_LADDER);
1699 replacePlayer = true;
1700 break;
1701 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAccidentVines:
1702 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ACCIDENT_VINES);
1703 replacePlayer = true;
1704 break;
1705 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAccidentWater:
1706 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ACCIDENT_WATER);
1707 replacePlayer = true;
1708 break;
1709 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAccidentGeneric:
1710 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ACCIDENT_GENERIC);
1711 replacePlayer = true;
1712 break;
1713 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellKiller:
1714 //message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_KILLER);
1715 //replacePlayer = true;
1716 //replaceEntitySource = true;
1717
1718 // 4J Stu - The correct string for here, IDS_DEATH_FELL_KILLER is incorrect. We can't change localisation, so use a different string for now
1719 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FALL);
1720 replacePlayer = true;
1721 break;
1722 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAssist:
1723 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ASSIST);
1724 replacePlayer = true;
1725 replaceEntitySource = true;
1726 break;
1727 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellAssistItem:
1728 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_ASSIST_ITEM);
1729 replacePlayer = true;
1730 replaceEntitySource = true;
1731 replaceItem = true;
1732 break;
1733 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellFinish:
1734 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_FINISH);
1735 replacePlayer = true;
1736 replaceEntitySource = true;
1737 break;
1738 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFellFinishItem:
1739 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FELL_FINISH_ITEM);
1740 replacePlayer = true;
1741 replaceEntitySource = true;
1742 replaceItem = true;
1743 break;
1744 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathInFirePlayer:
1745 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_INFIRE_PLAYER);
1746 replacePlayer = true;
1747 replaceEntitySource = true;
1748 break;
1749 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathOnFirePlayer:
1750 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_ONFIRE_PLAYER);
1751 replacePlayer = true;
1752 replaceEntitySource = true;
1753 break;
1754 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathLavaPlayer:
1755 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_LAVA_PLAYER);
1756 replacePlayer = true;
1757 replaceEntitySource = true;
1758 break;
1759 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathDrownPlayer:
1760 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_DROWN_PLAYER);
1761 replacePlayer = true;
1762 replaceEntitySource = true;
1763 break;
1764 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathCactusPlayer:
1765 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_CACTUS_PLAYER);
1766 replacePlayer = true;
1767 replaceEntitySource = true;
1768 break;
1769 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathExplosionPlayer:
1770 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_EXPLOSION_PLAYER);
1771 replacePlayer = true;
1772 replaceEntitySource = true;
1773 break;
1774 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathWither:
1775 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_WITHER);
1776 replacePlayer = true;
1777 break;
1778 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathPlayerItem:
1779 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_PLAYER_ITEM);
1780 replacePlayer = true;
1781 replaceEntitySource = true;
1782 replaceItem = true;
1783 break;
1784 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathArrowItem:
1785 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_ARROW_ITEM);
1786 replacePlayer = true;
1787 replaceEntitySource = true;
1788 replaceItem = true;
1789 break;
1790 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathFireballItem:
1791 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_FIREBALL_ITEM);
1792 replacePlayer = true;
1793 replaceEntitySource = true;
1794 replaceItem = true;
1795 break;
1796 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathThrownItem:
1797 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_THROWN_ITEM);
1798 replacePlayer = true;
1799 replaceEntitySource = true;
1800 replaceItem = true;
1801 break;
1802 case ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathIndirectMagicItem:
1803 message=app.GetString(IDS_DEATH_INDIRECT_MAGIC_ITEM);
1804 replacePlayer = true;
1805 replaceEntitySource = true;
1806 replaceItem = true;
1807 break;
1808
1809 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerEnteredEnd:
1810 message=app.GetString(IDS_PLAYER_ENTERED_END);
1811 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1812 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1813 break;
1814 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerLeftEnd:
1815 message=app.GetString(IDS_PLAYER_LEFT_END);
1816 iPos=message.find(L"%s");
1817 message.replace(iPos,2,playerDisplayName);
1818 break;
1819
1820 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxEnemies:
1821 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_ENEMIES_SPAWNED);
1822 break;
1823 // Spawn eggs
1824 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxVillagers:
1825 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_VILLAGERS_SPAWNED);
1826 break;
1827 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxPigsSheepCows:
1828 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_PIGS_SHEEP_COWS_CATS_SPAWNED);
1829 break;
1830 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxChickens:
1831 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_CHICKENS_SPAWNED);
1832 break;
1833 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxSquid:
1834 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_SQUID_SPAWNED);
1835 break;
1836 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxMooshrooms:
1837 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_MOOSHROOMS_SPAWNED);
1838 break;
1839 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxWolves:
1840 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_WOLVES_SPAWNED);
1841 break;
1842 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBats:
1843 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_BATS_SPAWNED);
1844 break;
1845
1846 // Breeding
1847 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBredPigsSheepCows:
1848 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_PIGS_SHEEP_COWS_CATS_BRED);
1849 break;
1850 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBredChickens:
1851 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_CHICKENS_BRED);
1852 break;
1853 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBredMooshrooms:
1854 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_MUSHROOMCOWS_BRED);
1855 break;
1856
1857 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBredWolves:
1858 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_WOLVES_BRED);
1859 break;
1860
1861 // can't shear the mooshroom
1862 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerCantShearMooshroom:
1863 message=app.GetString(IDS_CANT_SHEAR_MOOSHROOM);
1864 break;
1865
1866 // Paintings/Item Frames
1867 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxHangingEntities:
1868 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_HANGINGENTITIES);
1869 break;
1870 // Enemy spawn eggs in peaceful
1871 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerCantSpawnInPeaceful:
1872 message=app.GetString(IDS_CANT_SPAWN_IN_PEACEFUL);
1873 break;
1874
1875 // Enemy spawn eggs in peaceful
1876 case ChatPacket::e_ChatPlayerMaxBoats:
1877 message=app.GetString(IDS_MAX_BOATS);
1878 break;
1879
1880 case ChatPacket::e_ChatCommandTeleportSuccess:
1881 message=app.GetString(IDS_COMMAND_TELEPORT_SUCCESS);
1882 replacePlayer = true;
1883 if(packet->m_intArgs[0] == eTYPE_SERVERPLAYER)
1884 {
1885 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*DESTINATION*}", sourceDisplayName);
1886 }
1887 else
1888 {
1889 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*DESTINATION*}", app.getEntityName((eINSTANCEOF)packet->m_intArgs[0]));
1890 }
1891 break;
1892 case ChatPacket::e_ChatCommandTeleportMe:
1893 message=app.GetString(IDS_COMMAND_TELEPORT_ME);
1894 replacePlayer = true;
1895 break;
1896 case ChatPacket::e_ChatCommandTeleportToMe:
1897 message=app.GetString(IDS_COMMAND_TELEPORT_TO_ME);
1898 replacePlayer = true;
1899 break;
1900
1901 default:
1902 message = playerDisplayName;
1903 break;
1904 }
1905
1906
1907 if(replacePlayer)
1908 {
1909 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*PLAYER*}",playerDisplayName);
1910 }
1911
1912 if(replaceEntitySource)
1913 {
1914 if(packet->m_intArgs[0] == eTYPE_SERVERPLAYER)
1915 {
1916 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*SOURCE*}", sourceDisplayName);
1917 }
1918 else
1919 {
1920 wstring entityName;
1921
1922 // Check for a custom mob name
1923 if (packet->m_stringArgs.size() >= 2 && !packet->m_stringArgs[1].empty())
1924 {
1925 entityName = packet->m_stringArgs[1];
1926 }
1927 else
1928 {
1929 entityName = app.getEntityName((eINSTANCEOF) packet->m_intArgs[0]);
1930 }
1931
1932 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*SOURCE*}", entityName);
1933 }
1934 }
1935
1936 if (replaceItem)
1937 {
1938 message = replaceAll(message,L"{*ITEM*}", packet->m_stringArgs[2]);
1939 }
1940
1941 // flag that a message is a death message
1942 bool bIsDeathMessage = (packet->m_messageType>=ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathInFire) && (packet->m_messageType<=ChatPacket::e_ChatDeathIndirectMagicItem);
1943
1944 if( displayOnGui ) minecraft->gui->addMessage(message,m_userIndex, bIsDeathMessage);
1945}
1946
1947void ClientConnection::handleAnimate(shared_ptr<AnimatePacket> packet)
1948{
1949 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1950 if (e == nullptr) return;
1951 if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::SWING)
1952 {
1953 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_LIVINGENTITY)) dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(e)->swing();
1954 }
1955 else if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::HURT)
1956 {
1957 e->animateHurt();
1958 }
1959 else if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::WAKE_UP)
1960 {
1961 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER)) dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e)->stopSleepInBed(false, false, false);
1962 }
1963 else if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::RESPAWN)
1964 {
1965 }
1966 else if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::CRITICAL_HIT)
1967 {
1968 shared_ptr<CritParticle> critParticle = std::make_shared<CritParticle>(minecraft->level, e);
1969 critParticle->CritParticlePostConstructor();
1970 minecraft->particleEngine->add( critParticle );
1971 }
1972 else if (packet->action == AnimatePacket::MAGIC_CRITICAL_HIT)
1973 {
1974 shared_ptr<CritParticle> critParticle = std::make_shared<CritParticle>(minecraft->level, e, eParticleType_magicCrit);
1975 critParticle->CritParticlePostConstructor();
1976 minecraft->particleEngine->add(critParticle);
1977 }
1978 else if ( (packet->action == AnimatePacket::EAT) && e->instanceof(eTYPE_REMOTEPLAYER) )
1979 {
1980
1981 }
1982}
1983
1984void ClientConnection::handleEntityActionAtPosition(shared_ptr<EntityActionAtPositionPacket> packet)
1985{
1986 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
1987 if (e == nullptr) return;
1988 if (packet->action == EntityActionAtPositionPacket::START_SLEEP)
1989 {
1990 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e);
1991 player->startSleepInBed(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
1992
1993 if( player == minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex] )
1994 {
1995 TelemetryManager->RecordEnemyKilledOrOvercome(m_userIndex, 0, player->y, 0, 0, 0, 0, eTelemetryInGame_UseBed);
1996 }
1997 }
1998}
1999
2000void ClientConnection::handlePreLogin(shared_ptr<PreLoginPacket> packet)
2001{
2002// printf("Client: handlePreLogin\n");
2003#if 1
2004 // 4J - Check that we can play with all the players already in the game who have Friends-Only UGC set
2005 BOOL canPlay = TRUE;
2006 BOOL canPlayLocal = TRUE;
2007 BOOL isAtLeastOneFriend = g_NetworkManager.IsHost();
2008 BOOL isFriendsWithHost = TRUE;
2009 BOOL cantPlayContentRestricted = FALSE;
2010
2011 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost())
2012 {
2013 // set the game host settings
2014 app.SetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_All,packet->m_serverSettings);
2015
2016 // 4J-PB - if we go straight in from the menus via an invite, we won't have the DLC info
2017 if(app.GetTMSGlobalFileListRead()==false)
2018 {
2019 app.SetTMSAction(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),eTMSAction_TMSPP_RetrieveFiles_RunPlayGame);
2020 }
2021 }
2022
2023#ifdef _XBOX
2024 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() && !app.GetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_FriendsOfFriends))
2025 {
2026 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() )
2027 {
2028 for(DWORD idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
2029 {
2030 if(ProfileManager.IsSignedIn(m_userIndex) && ProfileManager.IsGuest(idx))
2031 {
2032 canPlay = FALSE;
2033 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2034 }
2035 else
2036 {
2037 PlayerUID playerXuid = INVALID_XUID;
2038 if( ProfileManager.IsSignedInLive(idx) )
2039 {
2040 ProfileManager.GetXUID(idx,&playerXuid,true);
2041 }
2042 if( playerXuid != INVALID_XUID )
2043 {
2044 // Is this user friends with the host player?
2045 BOOL result;
2046 DWORD error;
2047 error = XUserAreUsersFriends(idx,&packet->m_playerXuids[packet->m_hostIndex],1,&result,nullptr);
2048 if(error == ERROR_SUCCESS && result != TRUE)
2049 {
2050 canPlay = FALSE;
2051 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2052 }
2053 }
2054 }
2055 if(!canPlay) break;
2056 }
2057 }
2058 else
2059 {
2060 if(ProfileManager.IsSignedIn(m_userIndex) && ProfileManager.IsGuest(m_userIndex))
2061 {
2062 canPlay = FALSE;
2063 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2064 }
2065 else
2066 {
2067 PlayerUID playerXuid = INVALID_XUID;
2068 if( ProfileManager.IsSignedInLive(m_userIndex) )
2069 {
2070 ProfileManager.GetXUID(m_userIndex,&playerXuid,true);
2071 }
2072 if( playerXuid != INVALID_XUID )
2073 {
2074 // Is this user friends with the host player?
2075 BOOL result;
2076 DWORD error;
2077 error = XUserAreUsersFriends(m_userIndex,&packet->m_playerXuids[packet->m_hostIndex],1,&result,nullptr);
2078 if(error == ERROR_SUCCESS && result != TRUE)
2079 {
2080 canPlay = FALSE;
2081 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2082 }
2083 }
2084 }
2085 }
2086 }
2087
2088 if( canPlay )
2089 {
2090 for(DWORD i = 0; i < packet->m_dwPlayerCount; ++i)
2091 {
2092 bool localPlayer = false;
2093 for(DWORD idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
2094 {
2095 if( ProfileManager.IsSignedInLive(idx) )
2096 {
2097 // need to use the XUID here
2098 PlayerUID playerXUID = INVALID_XUID;
2099 if( !ProfileManager.IsGuest( idx ) )
2100 {
2101 // Guest don't have an offline XUID as they cannot play offline, so use their online one
2102 ProfileManager.GetXUID(idx,&playerXUID,true);
2103 }
2104 if( ProfileManager.AreXUIDSEqual(playerXUID,packet->m_playerXuids[i]) ) localPlayer = true;
2105 }
2106 else if (ProfileManager.IsSignedIn(idx))
2107 {
2108 // If we aren't signed into live then they have to be a local player
2109 localPlayer = true;
2110 }
2111 }
2112 if(!localPlayer)
2113 {
2114 // First check our own permissions to see if we can play with this player
2115 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() )
2116 {
2117 canPlayLocal = ProfileManager.CanViewPlayerCreatedContent(m_userIndex,false,&packet->m_playerXuids[i],1);
2118
2119 // 4J Stu - Everyone joining needs to have at least one friend in the game
2120 // Local players are implied friends
2121 if( isAtLeastOneFriend != TRUE )
2122 {
2123 BOOL result;
2124 DWORD error;
2125 for(DWORD idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
2126 {
2127 if( ProfileManager.IsSignedIn(idx) && !ProfileManager.IsGuest(idx) )
2128 {
2129 error = XUserAreUsersFriends(idx,&packet->m_playerXuids[i],1,&result,nullptr);
2130 if(error == ERROR_SUCCESS && result == TRUE) isAtLeastOneFriend = TRUE;
2131 }
2132 }
2133 }
2134 }
2135 else
2136 {
2137 // Friends with the primary player on this system
2138 isAtLeastOneFriend = true;
2139
2140 canPlayLocal = ProfileManager.CanViewPlayerCreatedContent(m_userIndex,true,&packet->m_playerXuids[i],1);
2141 }
2142
2143 // If we can play with them, then check if they can play with us
2144 if( canPlayLocal && ( packet->m_friendsOnlyBits & (1<<i) ) )
2145 {
2146 // If this is the primary pad then check all local players against the list in the packet (this happens when joining the game for the first time)
2147 // If not the primary pad, then just check against this index. It happens on joining at the start, but more importantly players trying to join during the game
2148 bool thisQuadrantOnly = true;
2149 if( m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() ) thisQuadrantOnly = false;
2150
2151 BOOL result;
2152 DWORD error;
2153 for(DWORD idx = 0; idx < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++idx)
2154 {
2155 if( (!thisQuadrantOnly || m_userIndex == idx) && ProfileManager.IsSignedIn(idx) && !ProfileManager.IsGuest(idx) )
2156 {
2157 error = XUserAreUsersFriends(idx,&packet->m_playerXuids[i],1,&result,nullptr);
2158 if(error == ERROR_SUCCESS) canPlay &= result;
2159 }
2160 if(!canPlay) break;
2161 }
2162 }
2163 if(!canPlay || !canPlayLocal) break;
2164 }
2165 }
2166 }
2167#else
2168 // TODO - handle this kind of things for non-360 platforms
2169 canPlay = TRUE;
2170 canPlayLocal = TRUE;
2171 isAtLeastOneFriend = TRUE;
2172 cantPlayContentRestricted= FALSE;
2173
2174#if ( defined __PS3__ || defined __ORBIS__ || defined __PSVITA__)
2175
2176 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() && !app.GetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_FriendsOfFriends))
2177 {
2178 bool bChatRestricted=false;
2179
2180 ProfileManager.GetChatAndContentRestrictions(m_userIndex,true,&bChatRestricted,nullptr,nullptr);
2181
2182 // Chat restricted orbis players can still play online
2183#ifndef __ORBIS__
2184 canPlay = !bChatRestricted;
2185#endif
2186
2187 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad() )
2188 {
2189 // Is this user friends with the host player?
2190 bool isFriend = true;
2191 unsigned int friendCount = 0;
2192#ifdef __PS3__
2193 int ret = sceNpBasicGetFriendListEntryCount(&friendCount);
2194#elif defined __PSVITA__
2195 sce::Toolkit::NP::Utilities::Future<sce::Toolkit::NP::FriendsList> friendList;
2196 int ret = -1;
2197 if(!CGameNetworkManager::usingAdhocMode()) // we don't need to be friends in PSN for adhoc mode
2198 {
2199 int ret = sce::Toolkit::NP::Friends::Interface::getFriendslist(&friendList, false);
2200 if(ret == SCE_TOOLKIT_NP_SUCCESS)
2201 {
2202 if( friendList.hasResult() )
2203 {
2204 friendCount = friendList.get()->size();
2205 }
2206 }
2207 }
2208#else // __ORBIS__
2209
2210 sce::Toolkit::NP::Utilities::Future<sce::Toolkit::NP::FriendsList> friendList;
2211
2212 sce::Toolkit::NP::FriendInfoRequest requestParam;
2213 memset(&requestParam,0,sizeof(requestParam));
2214 requestParam.flag = SCE_TOOLKIT_NP_FRIENDS_LIST_ALL;
2215 requestParam.limit = 0;
2216 requestParam.offset = 0;
2217 requestParam.userInfo.userId = ProfileManager.getUserID(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad());
2218
2219 int ret = sce::Toolkit::NP::Friends::Interface::getFriendslist(&friendList, &requestParam, false);
2220 if( ret == 0 )
2221 {
2222 if( friendList.hasResult() )
2223 {
2224 friendCount = friendList.get()->size();
2225 }
2226 }
2227#endif
2228 if( ret == 0 )
2229 {
2230 isFriend = false;
2231 SceNpId npid;
2232 for( unsigned int i = 0; i < friendCount; i++ )
2233 {
2234#ifdef __PS3__
2235 ret = sceNpBasicGetFriendListEntry( i, &npid );
2236#else
2237 npid = friendList.get()->at(i).npid;
2238#endif
2239 if( ret == 0 )
2240 {
2241 if(strcmp(npid.handle.data, packet->m_playerXuids[packet->m_hostIndex].getOnlineID()) == 0)
2242 {
2243 isFriend = true;
2244 break;
2245 }
2246 }
2247 }
2248 }
2249
2250 if( !isFriend )
2251 {
2252 canPlay = FALSE;
2253 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2254 }
2255 }
2256 }
2257 // is it an online game, and a player has chat restricted?
2258 else if(!g_NetworkManager.IsLocalGame())
2259 {
2260 // if the player is chat restricted, then they can't play an online game
2261 bool bChatRestricted=false;
2262 bool bContentRestricted=false;
2263
2264 // If this is a pre-login packet for the first player on the machine, then accumulate up these flags for everyone signed in. We can handle exiting the game
2265 // much more cleanly at this point by exiting the level, rather than waiting for a prelogin packet for the other players, when we have to exit the player
2266 // which seems to be very unstable at the point of starting up the game
2267 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad())
2268 {
2269 ProfileManager.GetChatAndContentRestrictions(m_userIndex,false,&bChatRestricted,&bContentRestricted,nullptr);
2270 }
2271 else
2272 {
2273 ProfileManager.GetChatAndContentRestrictions(m_userIndex,true,&bChatRestricted,&bContentRestricted,nullptr);
2274 }
2275
2276 // Chat restricted orbis players can still play online
2277#ifndef __ORBIS__
2278 canPlayLocal = !bChatRestricted;
2279#endif
2280
2281 cantPlayContentRestricted = bContentRestricted ? 1 : 0;
2282 }
2283
2284
2285#endif
2286
2287#ifdef _XBOX_ONE
2288 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() && m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad())
2289 {
