2290 long long startTime = System::currentTimeMillis();
2291
2292 auto friendsXuids = DQRNetworkManager::GetFriends();
2293
2294 if (app.GetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_FriendsOfFriends))
2295 {
2296 // Check that the user has at least one friend in the game
2297 isAtLeastOneFriend = false;
2298
2299 for (int i = 0; i < friendsXuids->Size; i++)
2300 {
2301 auto friendsXuid = friendsXuids->GetAt(i);
2302
2303 // Check this friend against each player, if we find them we have at least one friend
2304 for (int j = 0; j < g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerCount(); j++)
2305 {
2306 Platform::String^ xboxUserId = ref new Platform::String(g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerByIndex(j)->GetUID().toString().data());
2307 if (friendsXuid == xboxUserId)
2308 {
2309 isAtLeastOneFriend = true;
2310 break;
2311 }
2312 }
2313 }
2314
2315 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection::handlePreLogin: User has at least one friend? %s\n", isAtLeastOneFriend ? "Yes" : "No");
2316 }
2317 else
2318 {
2319 // Check that the user is friends with the host
2320 bool isFriend = false;
2321
2322 Platform::String^ hostXboxUserId = ref new Platform::String(g_NetworkManager.GetHostPlayer()->GetUID().toString().data());
2323
2324 for (int i = 0; i < friendsXuids->Size; i++)
2325 {
2326 if (friendsXuids->GetAt(i) == hostXboxUserId)
2327 {
2328 isFriend = true;
2329 break;
2330 }
2331 }
2332
2333 if( !isFriend )
2334 {
2335 canPlay = FALSE;
2336 isFriendsWithHost = FALSE;
2337 }
2338
2339 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection::handlePreLogin: User is friends with the host? %s\n", isFriendsWithHost ? "Yes" : "No");
2340 }
2341
2342 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection::handlePreLogin: Friendship checks took %i ms\n", System::currentTimeMillis() - startTime);
2343 }
2344#endif
2345
2346#endif // _XBOX
2347
2348 if(!canPlay || !canPlayLocal || !isAtLeastOneFriend || cantPlayContentRestricted)
2349 {
2350#ifndef __PS3__
2351 DisconnectPacket::eDisconnectReason reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NoUGC_Remote;
2352#else
2353 DisconnectPacket::eDisconnectReason reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_None;
2354#endif
2355 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad())
2356 {
2357 if(!isFriendsWithHost) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NotFriendsWithHost;
2358 else if(!isAtLeastOneFriend) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NoFriendsInGame;
2359 else if(!canPlayLocal) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NoUGC_AllLocal;
2360 else if(cantPlayContentRestricted) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_ContentRestricted_AllLocal;
2361
2362 app.DebugPrintf("Exiting world on handling Pre-Login packet due UGC privileges: %d\n", reason);
2363 app.SetDisconnectReason( reason );
2364 app.SetAction(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),eAppAction_ExitWorld,(void *)TRUE);
2365 }
2366 else
2367 {
2368 if(!isFriendsWithHost) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NotFriendsWithHost;
2369 else if(!canPlayLocal) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_NoUGC_Single_Local;
2370 else if(cantPlayContentRestricted) reason = DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_ContentRestricted_Single_Local;
2371
2372 app.DebugPrintf("Exiting player %d on handling Pre-Login packet due UGC privileges: %d\n", m_userIndex, reason);
2373 UINT uiIDA[1];
2374 uiIDA[0]=IDS_CONFIRM_OK;
2375 if(!isFriendsWithHost) ui.RequestErrorMessage( IDS_CANTJOIN_TITLE, IDS_NOTALLOWED_FRIENDSOFFRIENDS, uiIDA,1,m_userIndex);
2376 else ui.RequestErrorMessage( IDS_CANTJOIN_TITLE, IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_SINGLE_LOCAL, uiIDA,1,m_userIndex);
2377
2378 app.SetDisconnectReason( reason );
2379
2380 // 4J-PB - this locks up on the read and write threads not closing down, because they are trying to lock the incoming critsec when it's already locked by this thread
2381// Minecraft::GetInstance()->connectionDisconnected( m_userIndex , reason );
2382// done = true;
2383// connection->flush();
2384// connection->close(reason);
2385// app.SetAction(m_userIndex,eAppAction_ExitPlayer);
2386
2387 // 4J-PB - doing this instead
2388 app.SetAction(m_userIndex,eAppAction_ExitPlayerPreLogin);
2389 }
2390 }
2391 else
2392 {
2393 // Texture pack handling
2394 // If we have the texture pack for the game, load it
2395 // If we don't then send a packet to the host to request it. We need to send this before the LoginPacket so that it gets handled first,
2396 // as once the LoginPacket is received on the client the game is close to starting
2397 if(m_userIndex == ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad())
2398 {
2399 Minecraft *pMinecraft = Minecraft::GetInstance();
2400 if( pMinecraft->skins->selectTexturePackById(packet->m_texturePackId) )
2401 {
2402 app.DebugPrintf("Selected texture pack %d from Pre-Login packet\n", packet->m_texturePackId);
2403 }
2404 else
2405 {
2406 app.DebugPrintf("Could not select texture pack %d from Pre-Login packet, requesting from host\n", packet->m_texturePackId);
2407
2408 // 4J-PB - we need to upsell the texture pack to the player
2409#if defined __PS3__ || defined __ORBIS__ || defined __PSVITA__
2410 app.SetAction(m_userIndex,eAppAction_TexturePackRequired);
2411#endif
2412 // Let the player go into the game, and we'll check that they are using the right texture pack when in
2413 }
2414 }
2415
2416 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() )
2417 {
2418 Minecraft::GetInstance()->progressRenderer->progressStagePercentage((eCCPreLoginReceived * 100)/ (eCCConnected));
2419 }
2420 // need to use the XUID here
2421 PlayerUID offlineXUID = INVALID_XUID;
2422 PlayerUID onlineXUID = INVALID_XUID;
2423 if( ProfileManager.IsSignedInLive(m_userIndex) )
2424 {
2425 // Guest don't have an offline XUID as they cannot play offline, so use their online one
2426 ProfileManager.GetXUID(m_userIndex,&onlineXUID,true);
2427 }
2428#ifdef __PSVITA__
2429 if(CGameNetworkManager::usingAdhocMode() && onlineXUID.getOnlineID()[0] == 0)
2430 {
2431 // player doesn't have an online UID, set it from the player name
2432 onlineXUID.setForAdhoc();
2433 }
2434#endif
2435
2436 // On PS3, all non-signed in players (even guests) can get a useful offlineXUID
2437#if !(defined __PS3__ || defined _DURANGO )
2438 if( !ProfileManager.IsGuest( m_userIndex ) )
2439#endif
2440 {
2441 // All other players we use their offline XUID so that they can play the game offline
2442 ProfileManager.GetXUID(m_userIndex,&offlineXUID,false);
2443 }
2444 BOOL allAllowed, friendsAllowed;
2445 ProfileManager.AllowedPlayerCreatedContent(m_userIndex,true,&allAllowed,&friendsAllowed);
2446 send(std::make_shared<LoginPacket>(minecraft->user->name, SharedConstants::NETWORK_PROTOCOL_VERSION, offlineXUID, onlineXUID, (allAllowed != TRUE && friendsAllowed == TRUE),
2447 packet->m_ugcPlayersVersion, app.GetPlayerSkinId(m_userIndex), app.GetPlayerCapeId(m_userIndex), ProfileManager.IsGuest(m_userIndex)));
2448
2449 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() )
2450 {
2451 Minecraft::GetInstance()->progressRenderer->progressStagePercentage((eCCLoginSent * 100)/ (eCCConnected));
2452 }
2453 }
2454#else
2455 // 4J - removed
2456 if (packet->loginKey.equals("-")) {
2457 send(new LoginPacket(minecraft->user.name, SharedConstants.NETWORK_PROTOCOL_VERSION));
2458 } else {
2459 try {
2460 URL url = new URL("http://www.minecraft->net/game/joinserver.jsp?user=" + minecraft->user.name + "&sessionId=" + minecraft->user.sessionId + "&serverId=" + packet->loginKey);
2461 BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(url.openStream()));
2462 String msg = br.readLine();
2463 br.close();
2464
2465 if (msg.equalsIgnoreCase("ok")) {
2466 send(new LoginPacket(minecraft->user.name, SharedConstants.NETWORK_PROTOCOL_VERSION));
2467 } else {
2468 connection.close("disconnect.loginFailedInfo", msg);
2469 }
2470 } catch (Exception e) {
2471 e.printStackTrace();
2472 connection.close("disconnect.genericReason", "Internal client error: " + e.toString());
2473 }
2474 }
2475#endif
2476}
2477
2478void ClientConnection::close()
2479{
2480 // If it's already done, then we don't need to do anything here. And in fact trying to do something could cause a crash
2481 if(done) return;
2482 done = true;
2483 m_trackedEntityIds.clear();
2484 m_visibleChunks.clear();
2485 connection->flush();
2486 connection->close(DisconnectPacket::eDisconnect_Closed);
2487}
2488
2489void ClientConnection::handleAddMob(shared_ptr<AddMobPacket> packet)
2490{
2491 double x = packet->x / 32.0;
2492 double y = packet->y / 32.0;
2493 double z = packet->z / 32.0;
2494 float yRot = packet->yRot * 360 / 256.0f;
2495 float xRot = packet->xRot * 360 / 256.0f;
2496
2497 shared_ptr<LivingEntity> mob = dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(EntityIO::newById(packet->type, level));
2498 mob->xp = packet->x;
2499 mob->yp = packet->y;
2500 mob->zp = packet->z;
2501 mob->yHeadRot = packet->yHeadRot * 360 / 256.0f;
2502 mob->yRotp = packet->yRot;
2503 mob->xRotp = packet->xRot;
2504
2505 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *subEntities = mob->getSubEntities();
2506 if (subEntities)
2507 {
2508 int offs = packet->id - mob->entityId;
2509 for (auto& it : *subEntities )
2510 {
2511 it->entityId += offs;
2512 }
2513 }
2514
2515 mob->entityId = packet->id;
2516
2517// printf("\t\t\t\t%d: Add mob rot %d\n",packet->id,packet->yRot);
2518
2519 mob->absMoveTo(x, y, z, yRot, xRot);
2520 mob->xd = packet->xd / 8000.0f;
2521 mob->yd = packet->yd / 8000.0f;
2522 mob->zd = packet->zd / 8000.0f;
2523 level->putEntity(packet->id, mob);
2524 m_trackedEntityIds.insert(packet->id);
2525
2526 vector<shared_ptr<SynchedEntityData::DataItem> > *unpackedData = packet->getUnpackedData();
2527 if (unpackedData != nullptr)
2528 {
2529 mob->getEntityData()->assignValues(unpackedData);
2530 }
2531
2532 // Fix for #65236 - TU8: Content: Gameplay: Magma Cubes' have strange hit boxes.
2533 // 4J Stu - Slimes have a different BB depending on their size which is set in the entity data, so update the BB
2534 if(mob->GetType() == eTYPE_SLIME || mob->GetType() == eTYPE_LAVASLIME)
2535 {
2536 shared_ptr<Slime> slime = dynamic_pointer_cast<Slime>(mob);
2537 slime->setSize( slime->getSize() );
2538 }
2539}
2540
2541void ClientConnection::handleSetTime(shared_ptr<SetTimePacket> packet)
2542{
2543 minecraft->level->setGameTime(packet->gameTime);
2544 minecraft->level->setDayTime(packet->dayTime);
2545}
2546
2547void ClientConnection::handleSetSpawn(shared_ptr<SetSpawnPositionPacket> packet)
2548{
2549 //minecraft->player->setRespawnPosition(new Pos(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z));
2550 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->setRespawnPosition(new Pos(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z), true);
2551 minecraft->level->getLevelData()->setSpawn(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
2552
2553}
2554
2555void ClientConnection::handleEntityLinkPacket(shared_ptr<SetEntityLinkPacket> packet)
2556{
2557 shared_ptr<Entity> sourceEntity = getEntity(packet->sourceId);
2558 shared_ptr<Entity> destEntity = getEntity(packet->destId);
2559
2560 // 4J: If the destination entity couldn't be found, defer handling of this packet
2561 // This was added to support leashing (the entity link packet is sent before the add entity packet)
2562 if (destEntity == nullptr && packet->destId >= 0)
2563 {
2564 // We don't handle missing source entities because it shouldn't happen
2565 assert(!(sourceEntity == nullptr && packet->sourceId >= 0));
2566
2567 deferredEntityLinkPackets.push_back(DeferredEntityLinkPacket(packet));
2568 return;
2569 }
2570
2571 if (packet->type == SetEntityLinkPacket::RIDING)
2572 {
2573 bool displayMountMessage = false;
2574 if (packet->sourceId == Minecraft::GetInstance()->localplayers[m_userIndex].get()->entityId)
2575 {
2576 sourceEntity = Minecraft::GetInstance()->localplayers[m_userIndex];
2577
2578 if (destEntity != nullptr && destEntity->instanceof(eTYPE_BOAT)) (dynamic_pointer_cast<Boat>(destEntity))->setDoLerp(false);
2579
2580 displayMountMessage = (sourceEntity->riding == nullptr && destEntity != nullptr);
2581 }
2582 else if (destEntity != nullptr && destEntity->instanceof(eTYPE_BOAT))
2583 {
2584 (dynamic_pointer_cast<Boat>(destEntity))->setDoLerp(true);
2585 }
2586
2587 if (sourceEntity == nullptr) return;
2588
2589 sourceEntity->ride(destEntity);
2590
2591 // 4J TODO: pretty sure this message is a tooltip so not needed
2592 /*
2593 if (displayMountMessage) {
2594 Options options = minecraft.options;
2595 minecraft.gui.setOverlayMessage(I18n.get("mount.onboard", Options.getTranslatedKeyMessage(options.keySneak.key)), false);
2596 }
2597 */
2598 }
2599 else if (packet->type == SetEntityLinkPacket::LEASH)
2600 {
2601 if ( (sourceEntity != nullptr) && sourceEntity->instanceof(eTYPE_MOB) )
2602 {
2603 if (destEntity != nullptr)
2604 {
2605
2606 (dynamic_pointer_cast<Mob>(sourceEntity))->setLeashedTo(destEntity, false);
2607 }
2608 else
2609 {
2610 (dynamic_pointer_cast<Mob>(sourceEntity))->dropLeash(false, false);
2611 }
2612 }
2613 }
2614}
2615
2616void ClientConnection::handleEntityEvent(shared_ptr<EntityEventPacket> packet)
2617{
2618 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->entityId);
2619 if (e != nullptr) e->handleEntityEvent(packet->eventId);
2620}
2621
2622shared_ptr<Entity> ClientConnection::getEntity(int entityId)
2623{
2624 //if (entityId == minecraft->player->entityId)
2625 if(entityId == minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->entityId)
2626 {
2627 //return minecraft->player;
2628 return minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
2629 }
2630 return level->getEntity(entityId);
2631}
2632
2633void ClientConnection::handleSetHealth(shared_ptr<SetHealthPacket> packet)
2634{
2635 //minecraft->player->hurtTo(packet->health);
2636 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->hurtTo(packet->health,packet->damageSource);
2637 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->getFoodData()->setFoodLevel(packet->food);
2638 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->getFoodData()->setSaturation(packet->saturation);
2639
2640 // We need food
2641 if(packet->food < FoodConstants::HEAL_LEVEL - 1)
2642 {
2643 if(minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex] != nullptr && !minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex]->hasInfiniteItems() )
2644 {
2645 minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex]->getTutorial()->changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar);
2646 }
2647 }
2648}
2649
2650void ClientConnection::handleSetExperience(shared_ptr<SetExperiencePacket> packet)
2651{
2652 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->setExperienceValues(packet->experienceProgress, packet->totalExperience, packet->experienceLevel);
2653}
2654
2655void ClientConnection::handleTexture(shared_ptr<TexturePacket> packet)
2656{
2657 // Both PlayerConnection and ClientConnection should handle this mostly the same way
2658 // Server side also needs to store a list of those clients waiting to get a texture the server doesn't have yet
2659 // so that it can send it out to them when it comes in
2660
2661 if(packet->dwBytes==0)
2662 {
2663 // Request for texture
2664#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2665 wprintf(L"Client received request for custom texture %ls\n",packet->textureName.c_str());
2666#endif
2667 PBYTE pbData=nullptr;
2668 DWORD dwBytes=0;
2669 app.GetMemFileDetails(packet->textureName,&pbData,&dwBytes);
2670
2671 if(dwBytes!=0)
2672 {
2673 send(std::make_shared<TexturePacket>(packet->textureName, pbData, dwBytes));
2674 }
2675 }
2676 else
2677 {
2678 // Response with texture data
2679#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2680 wprintf(L"Client received custom texture %ls\n",packet->textureName.c_str());
2681#endif
2682 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(packet->textureName,packet->pbData,packet->dwBytes);
2683 Minecraft::GetInstance()->handleClientTextureReceived(packet->textureName);
2684 }
2685}
2686
2687void ClientConnection::handleTextureAndGeometry(shared_ptr<TextureAndGeometryPacket> packet)
2688{
2689 // Both PlayerConnection and ClientConnection should handle this mostly the same way
2690 // Server side also needs to store a list of those clients waiting to get a texture the server doesn't have yet
2691 // so that it can send it out to them when it comes in
2692
2693 if(packet->dwTextureBytes==0)
2694 {
2695 // Request for texture
2696#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2697 wprintf(L"Client received request for custom texture and geometry %ls\n",packet->textureName.c_str());
2698#endif
2699 PBYTE pbData=nullptr;
2700 DWORD dwBytes=0;
2701 app.GetMemFileDetails(packet->textureName,&pbData,&dwBytes);
2702 DLCSkinFile *pDLCSkinFile = app.m_dlcManager.getSkinFile(packet->textureName);
2703
2704 if(dwBytes!=0)
2705 {
2706 if(pDLCSkinFile)
2707 {
2708 if(pDLCSkinFile->getAdditionalBoxesCount()!=0)
2709 {
2710 send(std::make_shared<TextureAndGeometryPacket>(packet->textureName, pbData, dwBytes, pDLCSkinFile));
2711 }
2712 else
2713 {
2714 send(std::make_shared<TextureAndGeometryPacket>(packet->textureName, pbData, dwBytes));
2715 }
2716 }
2717 else
2718 {
2719 unsigned int uiAnimOverrideBitmask= app.GetAnimOverrideBitmask(packet->dwSkinID);
2720
2721 send(std::make_shared<TextureAndGeometryPacket>(packet->textureName, pbData, dwBytes, app.GetAdditionalSkinBoxes(packet->dwSkinID), uiAnimOverrideBitmask));
2722 }
2723 }
2724 }
2725 else
2726 {
2727 // Response with texture data
2728#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2729 wprintf(L"Client received custom TextureAndGeometry %ls\n",packet->textureName.c_str());
2730#endif
2731 // Add the texture data
2732 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(packet->textureName,packet->pbData,packet->dwTextureBytes);
2733 // Add the geometry data
2734 if(packet->dwBoxC!=0)
2735 {
2736 app.SetAdditionalSkinBoxes(packet->dwSkinID,packet->BoxDataA,packet->dwBoxC);
2737 }
2738 // Add the anim override
2739 app.SetAnimOverrideBitmask(packet->dwSkinID,packet->uiAnimOverrideBitmask);
2740
2741 // clear out the pending texture request
2742 Minecraft::GetInstance()->handleClientTextureReceived(packet->textureName);
2743 }
2744}
2745
2746void ClientConnection::handleTextureChange(shared_ptr<TextureChangePacket> packet)
2747{
2748 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
2749 if ( (e == nullptr) || !e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER) ) return;
2750 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e);
2751
2752 bool isLocalPlayer = false;
2753 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
2754 {
2755 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
2756 {
2757 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->id )
2758 {
2759 isLocalPlayer = true;
2760 break;
2761 }
2762 }
2763 }
2764 if(isLocalPlayer) return;
2765
2766 switch(packet->action)
2767 {
2768 case TextureChangePacket::e_TextureChange_Skin:
2769 player->setCustomSkin( app.getSkinIdFromPath( packet->path ) );
2770#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2771 wprintf(L"Skin for remote player %ls has changed to %ls (%d)\n", player->name.c_str(), player->customTextureUrl.c_str(), player->getPlayerDefaultSkin() );
2772#endif
2773 break;
2774 case TextureChangePacket::e_TextureChange_Cape:
2775 player->setCustomCape( Player::getCapeIdFromPath( packet->path ) );
2776 //player->customTextureUrl2 = packet->path;
2777#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2778 wprintf(L"Cape for remote player %ls has changed to %ls\n", player->name.c_str(), player->customTextureUrl2.c_str() );
2779#endif
2780 break;
2781 }
2782
2783 if(!packet->path.empty() && packet->path.substr(0,3).compare(L"def") != 0 && !app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(packet->path))
2784 {
2785 if( minecraft->addPendingClientTextureRequest(packet->path) )
2786 {
2787#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2788 wprintf(L"handleTextureChange - Client sending texture packet to get custom skin %ls for player %ls\n",packet->path.c_str(), player->name.c_str());
2789#endif
2790 send(std::make_shared<TexturePacket>(
2791 player->customTextureUrl,
2792 nullptr,
2793 static_cast<DWORD>(0)));
2794 }
2795 }
2796 else if(!packet->path.empty() && app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(packet->path))
2797 {
2798 // Update the ref count on the memory texture data
2799 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(packet->path,nullptr,0);
2800 }
2801}
2802
2803void ClientConnection::handleTextureAndGeometryChange(shared_ptr<TextureAndGeometryChangePacket> packet)
2804{
2805 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->id);
2806 if (e == nullptr) return;
2807 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e);
2808 if( e == nullptr) return;
2809
2810 bool isLocalPlayer = false;
2811 for( int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; i++ )
2812 {
2813 if( minecraft->localplayers[i] )
2814 {
2815 if( minecraft->localplayers[i]->entityId == packet->id )
2816 {
2817 isLocalPlayer = true;
2818 break;
2819 }
2820 }
2821 }
2822 if(isLocalPlayer) return;
2823
2824
2825 player->setCustomSkin( app.getSkinIdFromPath( packet->path ) );
2826
2827#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2828 wprintf(L"Skin for remote player %ls has changed to %ls (%d)\n", player->name.c_str(), player->customTextureUrl.c_str(), player->getPlayerDefaultSkin() );
2829#endif
2830
2831 if(!packet->path.empty() && packet->path.substr(0,3).compare(L"def") != 0 && !app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(packet->path))
2832 {
2833 if( minecraft->addPendingClientTextureRequest(packet->path) )
2834 {
2835#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
2836 wprintf(L"handleTextureAndGeometryChange - Client sending TextureAndGeometryPacket to get custom skin %ls for player %ls\n",packet->path.c_str(), player->name.c_str());
2837#endif
2838 send(std::make_shared<TextureAndGeometryPacket>(
2839 packet->path,
2840 nullptr,
2841 static_cast<DWORD>(0)));
2842 }
2843 }
2844 else if(!packet->path.empty() && app.IsFileInMemoryTextures(packet->path))
2845 {
2846 // Update the ref count on the memory texture data
2847 app.AddMemoryTextureFile(packet->path,nullptr,0);
2848
2849 }
2850}
2851
2852void ClientConnection::handleRespawn(shared_ptr<RespawnPacket> packet)
2853{
2854 //if (packet->dimension != minecraft->player->dimension)
2855 if( packet->dimension != minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->dimension || packet->mapSeed != minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->level->getSeed() )
2856 {
2857 int oldDimension = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->dimension;
2858 started = false;
2859
2860 // Stop any streaming music (e.g. jukebox) when changing dimensions
2861 // so it doesn't leak into the new dimension
2862 level->playStreamingMusic(L"", 0, 0, 0);
2863
2864 m_trackedEntityIds.clear();
2865 m_visibleChunks.clear();
2866
2867 // Remove client connection from this level
2868 level->removeClientConnection(this, false);
2869
2870 MultiPlayerLevel *dimensionLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->getLevel( packet->dimension );
2871 if( dimensionLevel == nullptr )
2872 {
2873 dimensionLevel = new MultiPlayerLevel(this, new LevelSettings(packet->mapSeed, packet->playerGameType, false, minecraft->level->getLevelData()->isHardcore(), packet->m_newSeaLevel, packet->m_pLevelType, packet->m_xzSize, packet->m_hellScale), packet->dimension, packet->difficulty);
2874
2875 // 4J Stu - We want to shared the savedDataStorage between both levels
2876 //if( dimensionLevel->savedDataStorage != nullptr )
2877 //{
2878 // Don't need to delete it here as it belongs to a client connection while will delete it when it's done
2879 // delete dimensionLevel->savedDataStorage;+
2880 //}
2881 dimensionLevel->savedDataStorage = level->savedDataStorage;
2882
2883 dimensionLevel->difficulty = packet->difficulty; // 4J Added
2884 app.DebugPrintf("dimensionLevel->difficulty - Difficulty = %d\n",packet->difficulty);
2885
2886 dimensionLevel->isClientSide = true;
2887 }
2888 else
2889 {
2890 dimensionLevel->addClientConnection(this);
2891 }
2892
2893 // Remove the player entity from the current level
2894 level->removeEntity( shared_ptr<Entity>(minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]) );
2895
2896 level = dimensionLevel;
2897
2898 // Whilst calling setLevel, make sure that minecraft::player is set up to be correct for this
2899 // connection
2900 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> lastPlayer = minecraft->player;
2901 minecraft->player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
2902 minecraft->setLevel(dimensionLevel);
2903 minecraft->player = lastPlayer;
2904
2905 TelemetryManager->RecordLevelExit(m_userIndex, eSen_LevelExitStatus_Succeeded);
2906
2907 //minecraft->player->dimension = packet->dimension;
2908 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->dimension = packet->dimension;
2909 //minecraft->setScreen(new ReceivingLevelScreen(this));
2910// minecraft->addPendingLocalConnection(m_userIndex, this);
2911
2912#ifdef _XBOX
2913 TelemetryManager->RecordLevelStart(m_userIndex, eSen_FriendOrMatch_Playing_With_Invited_Friends, eSen_CompeteOrCoop_Coop_and_Competitive, Minecraft::GetInstance()->getLevel(packet->dimension)->difficulty, app.GetLocalPlayerCount(), g_NetworkManager.GetOnlinePlayerCount());
2914#endif
2915
2916 if( minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex] != nullptr )
2917 {
2918 TutorialMode *gameMode = (TutorialMode *)minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex];
2919 gameMode->getTutorial()->showTutorialPopup(false);
2920 }
2921
2922 // 4J-JEV: Fix for Durango #156334 - Content: UI: Rich Presence 'In the Nether' message is updating with a 3 to 10 minute delay.
2923 //minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->updateRichPresence();
2924
2925 ConnectionProgressParams *param = new ConnectionProgressParams();
2926 param->iPad = m_userIndex;
2927 if( packet->dimension == -1)
2928 {
2929 param->stringId = IDS_PROGRESS_ENTERING_NETHER;
2930 }
2931 else if( oldDimension == -1)
2932 {
2933 param->stringId = IDS_PROGRESS_LEAVING_NETHER;
2934 }
2935 else if( packet->dimension == 1)
2936 {
2937 param->stringId = IDS_PROGRESS_ENTERING_END;
2938 }
2939 else if( oldDimension == 1)
2940 {
2941 param->stringId = IDS_PROGRESS_LEAVING_END;
2942 }
2943 param->showTooltips = false;
2944 param->setFailTimer = false;
2945
2946 // 4J Stu - Fix for #13543 - Crash: Game crashes if entering a portal with the inventory menu open
2947 ui.CloseUIScenes( m_userIndex );
2948
2949 if(app.GetLocalPlayerCount()>1)
2950 {
2951 ui.NavigateToScene(m_userIndex, eUIScene_ConnectingProgress, param);
2952 }
2953 else
2954 {
2955 ui.NavigateToScene(m_userIndex, eUIScene_ConnectingProgress, param);
2956 }
2957
2958 app.SetAction( m_userIndex, eAppAction_WaitForDimensionChangeComplete);
2959 }
2960
2961 //minecraft->respawnPlayer(minecraft->player->GetXboxPad(),true, packet->dimension);
2962
2963 // Wrap respawnPlayer call up in code to set & restore the player/gamemode etc. as some things
2964 // in there assume that we are set up for the player that the respawn is coming in for
2965 int oldIndex = minecraft->getLocalPlayerIdx();
2966 minecraft->setLocalPlayerIdx(m_userIndex);
2967 minecraft->respawnPlayer(minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->GetXboxPad(),packet->dimension,packet->m_newEntityId);
2968 ((MultiPlayerGameMode *) minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex])->setLocalMode(packet->playerGameType);
2969 minecraft->setLocalPlayerIdx(oldIndex);
2970}
2971
2972void ClientConnection::handleExplosion(shared_ptr<ExplodePacket> packet)
2973{
2974 if (shouldProcessForPosition((int)packet->x, (int)packet->z))
2975 {
2976 if(!packet->m_bKnockbackOnly)
2977 {
2978 //app.DebugPrintf("Received ExplodePacket with explosion data\n");
2979 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Handling explosion");
2980 Explosion *e = new Explosion(minecraft->level, nullptr, packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->r);
2981 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Finalizing");
2982
2983 // Fix for #81758 - TCR 006 BAS Non-Interactive Pause: TU9: Performance: Gameplay: After detonating bunch of TNT, game enters unresponsive state for couple of seconds.
2984 // The changes we are making here have been decided by the server, so we don't need to add them to the vector that resets tiles changes made
2985 // on the client as we KNOW that the server is matching these changes
2986 MultiPlayerLevel *mpLevel = (MultiPlayerLevel *)minecraft->level;
2987 mpLevel->enableResetChanges(false);
2988 // 4J - now directly pass a pointer to the toBlow array in the packet rather than copying around
2989 e->finalizeExplosion(true, &packet->toBlow);
2990 mpLevel->enableResetChanges(true);
2991 PIXEndNamedEvent();
2992 PIXEndNamedEvent();
2993 delete e;
2994 }
2995 }
2996
2997 // Per-player knockback — each connection applies to its own local player
2998 //app.DebugPrintf("Adding knockback (%f,%f,%f) for player %d\n", packet->getKnockbackX(), packet->getKnockbackY(), packet->getKnockbackZ(), m_userIndex);
2999 if (minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex] == NULL)
3000 return;
3001 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->xd += packet->getKnockbackX();
3002 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->yd += packet->getKnockbackY();
3003 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->zd += packet->getKnockbackZ();
3004}
3005
3006void ClientConnection::handleContainerOpen(shared_ptr<ContainerOpenPacket> packet)
3007{
3008 bool failed = false;
3009 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3010 if (player == NULL)
3011 return;
3012 switch(packet->type)
3013 {
3014 case ContainerOpenPacket::BONUS_CHEST:
3015 case ContainerOpenPacket::LARGE_CHEST:
3016 case ContainerOpenPacket::ENDER_CHEST:
3017 case ContainerOpenPacket::CONTAINER:
3018 case ContainerOpenPacket::MINECART_CHEST:
3019 {
3020 int chestString;
3021 switch (packet->type)
3022 {
3023 case ContainerOpenPacket::MINECART_CHEST: chestString = IDS_ITEM_MINECART; break;
3024 case ContainerOpenPacket::BONUS_CHEST: chestString = IDS_BONUS_CHEST; break;
3025 case ContainerOpenPacket::LARGE_CHEST: chestString = IDS_CHEST_LARGE; break;
3026 case ContainerOpenPacket::ENDER_CHEST: chestString = IDS_TILE_ENDERCHEST; break;
3027 case ContainerOpenPacket::CONTAINER: chestString = IDS_CHEST; break;
3028 default: assert(false); chestString = -1; break;
3029 }
3030
3031 if( player->openContainer(std::make_shared<SimpleContainer>(chestString, packet->title, packet->customName, packet->size)))
3032 {
3033 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3034 }
3035 else
3036 {
3037 failed = true;
3038 }
3039 }
3040 break;
3041 case ContainerOpenPacket::HOPPER:
3042 {
3043 shared_ptr<HopperTileEntity> hopper = std::make_shared<HopperTileEntity>();
3044 if (packet->customName) hopper->setCustomName(packet->title);
3045 if(player->openHopper(hopper))
3046 {
3047 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3048 }
3049 else
3050 {
3051 failed = true;
3052 }
3053 }
3054 break;
3055 case ContainerOpenPacket::FURNACE:
3056 {
3057 shared_ptr<FurnaceTileEntity> furnace = std::make_shared<FurnaceTileEntity>();
3058 if (packet->customName) furnace->setCustomName(packet->title);
3059 if(player->openFurnace(furnace))
3060 {
3061 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3062 }
3063 else
3064 {
3065 failed = true;
3066 }
3067 }
3068 break;
3069 case ContainerOpenPacket::BREWING_STAND:
3070 {
3071 shared_ptr<BrewingStandTileEntity> brewingStand = std::make_shared<BrewingStandTileEntity>();
3072 if (packet->customName) brewingStand->setCustomName(packet->title);
3073
3074 if( player->openBrewingStand(brewingStand))
3075 {
3076 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3077 }
3078 else
3079 {
3080 failed = true;
3081 }
3082 }
3083 break;
3084 case ContainerOpenPacket::DROPPER:
3085 {
3086 shared_ptr<DropperTileEntity> dropper = std::make_shared<DropperTileEntity>();
3087 if (packet->customName) dropper->setCustomName(packet->title);
3088
3089 if( player->openTrap(dropper))
3090 {
3091 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3092 }
3093 else
3094 {
3095 failed = true;
3096 }
3097 }
3098 break;
3099 case ContainerOpenPacket::TRAP:
3100 {
3101 shared_ptr<DispenserTileEntity> dispenser = std::make_shared<DispenserTileEntity>();
3102 if (packet->customName) dispenser->setCustomName(packet->title);
3103
3104 if( player->openTrap(dispenser))
3105 {
3106 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3107 }
3108 else
3109 {
3110 failed = true;
3111 }
3112 }
3113 break;
3114 case ContainerOpenPacket::WORKBENCH:
3115 {
3116 if( player->startCrafting(Mth::floor(player->x), Mth::floor(player->y), Mth::floor(player->z)) )
3117 {
3118 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3119 }
3120 else
3121 {
3122 failed = true;
3123 }
3124 }
3125 break;
3126 case ContainerOpenPacket::ENCHANTMENT:
3127 {
3128 if( player->startEnchanting(Mth::floor(player->x), Mth::floor(player->y), Mth::floor(player->z), packet->customName ? packet->title : L"") )
3129 {
3130 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3131 }
3132 else
3133 {
3134 failed = true;
3135 }
3136 }
3137 break;
3138 case ContainerOpenPacket::TRADER_NPC:
3139 {
3140 shared_ptr<ClientSideMerchant> csm = std::make_shared<ClientSideMerchant>(player, packet->title);
3141 csm->createContainer();
3142 if(player->openTrading(csm, packet->customName ? packet->title : L""))
3143 {
3144 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3145 }
3146 else
3147 {
3148 failed = true;
3149 }
3150 }
3151 break;
3152 case ContainerOpenPacket::BEACON:
3153 {
3154 shared_ptr<BeaconTileEntity> beacon = std::make_shared<BeaconTileEntity>();
3155 if (packet->customName) beacon->setCustomName(packet->title);
3156
3157 if(player->openBeacon(beacon))
3158 {
3159 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3160 }
3161 else
3162 {
3163 failed = true;
3164 }
3165 }
3166 break;
3167 case ContainerOpenPacket::REPAIR_TABLE:
3168 {
3169 if(player->startRepairing(Mth::floor(player->x), Mth::floor(player->y), Mth::floor(player->z)))
3170 {
3171 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3172 }
3173 else
3174 {
3175 failed = true;
3176 }
3177 }
3178 break;
3179 case ContainerOpenPacket::HORSE:
3180 {
3181 shared_ptr<EntityHorse> entity = dynamic_pointer_cast<EntityHorse>( getEntity(packet->entityId) );
3182 int iTitle = IDS_CONTAINER_ANIMAL;
3183 switch(entity->getType())
3184 {
3185 case EntityHorse::TYPE_DONKEY:
3186 iTitle = IDS_DONKEY;
3187 break;
3188 case EntityHorse::TYPE_MULE:
3189 iTitle = IDS_MULE;
3190 break;
3191 };
3192 if(player->openHorseInventory(dynamic_pointer_cast<EntityHorse>(entity), std::make_shared<AnimalChest>(iTitle, packet->title, packet->customName, packet->size)))
3193 {
3194 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3195 }
3196 else
3197 {
3198 failed = true;
3199 }
3200 }
3201 break;
3202 case ContainerOpenPacket::FIREWORKS:
3203 {
3204 if( player->openFireworks(Mth::floor(player->x), Mth::floor(player->y), Mth::floor(player->z)) )
3205 {
3206 player->containerMenu->containerId = packet->containerId;
3207 }
3208 else
3209 {
3210 failed = true;
3211 }
3212 }
3213 break;
3214 }
3215
3216 if(failed)
3217 {
3218 // Failed - if we've got a non-inventory container currently here, close that, which locally should put us back
3219 // to not having a container open, and should send a containerclose to the server so it doesn't have a container open.
3220 // If we don't have a non-inventory container open, just send the packet, and again we ought to be in sync with the server.
3221 if( player->containerMenu != player->inventoryMenu )
3222 {
3223 ui.CloseUIScenes(m_userIndex);
3224 }
3225 else
3226 {
3227 send(std::make_shared<ContainerClosePacket>(packet->containerId));
3228 }
3229 }
3230}
3231
3232void ClientConnection::handleContainerSetSlot(shared_ptr<ContainerSetSlotPacket> packet)
3233{
3234 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3235 if (packet->containerId == AbstractContainerMenu::CONTAINER_ID_CARRIED )
3236 {
3237 player->inventory->setCarried(packet->item);
3238 }
3239 else
3240 {
3241 if (packet->containerId == AbstractContainerMenu::CONTAINER_ID_INVENTORY)
3242 {
3243 // 4J Stu - Reworked a bit to fix a bug where things being collected while the creative menu was up replaced items in the creative menu
3244 if(packet->slot >= 36 && packet->slot < 36 + 9)
3245 {
3246 shared_ptr<ItemInstance> lastItem = player->inventoryMenu->getSlot(packet->slot)->getItem();
3247 if (packet->item != nullptr)
3248 {
3249 if (lastItem == nullptr || lastItem->count < packet->item->count)
3250 {
3251 packet->item->popTime = Inventory::POP_TIME_DURATION;
3252 }
3253 }
3254 }
3255 player->inventoryMenu->setItem(packet->slot, packet->item);
3256 }
3257 else if (packet->containerId == player->containerMenu->containerId)
3258 {
3259 player->containerMenu->setItem(packet->slot, packet->item);
3260 }
3261 }
3262}
3263
3264void ClientConnection::handleContainerAck(shared_ptr<ContainerAckPacket> packet)
3265{
3266 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3267 AbstractContainerMenu *menu = nullptr;
3268 if (packet->containerId == AbstractContainerMenu::CONTAINER_ID_INVENTORY)
3269 {
3270 menu = player->inventoryMenu;
3271 }
3272 else if (packet->containerId == player->containerMenu->containerId)
3273 {
3274 menu = player->containerMenu;
3275 }
3276 if (menu != nullptr)
3277 {
3278 if (!packet->accepted)
3279 {
3280 send(std::make_shared<ContainerAckPacket>(packet->containerId, packet->uid, true));
3281 }
3282 }
3283}
3284
3285void ClientConnection::handleContainerContent(shared_ptr<ContainerSetContentPacket> packet)
3286{
3287 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3288 if (packet->containerId == AbstractContainerMenu::CONTAINER_ID_INVENTORY)
3289 {
3290 player->inventoryMenu->setAll(&packet->items);
3291 }
3292 else if (packet->containerId == player->containerMenu->containerId)
3293 {
3294 player->containerMenu->setAll(&packet->items);
3295 }
3296}
3297
3298void ClientConnection::handleTileEditorOpen(shared_ptr<TileEditorOpenPacket> packet)
3299{
3300 shared_ptr<TileEntity> tileEntity = level->getTileEntity(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
3301 if (tileEntity != nullptr)
3302 {
3303 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->openTextEdit(tileEntity);
3304 }
3305 else if (packet->editorType == TileEditorOpenPacket::SIGN)
3306 {
3307 shared_ptr<SignTileEntity> localSignDummy = std::make_shared<SignTileEntity>();
3308 localSignDummy->setLevel(level);
3309 localSignDummy->x = packet->x;
3310 localSignDummy->y = packet->y;
3311 localSignDummy->z = packet->z;
3312 minecraft->player->openTextEdit(localSignDummy);
3313 }
3314}
3315
3316void ClientConnection::handleSignUpdate(shared_ptr<SignUpdatePacket> packet)
3317{
3318 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection::handleSignUpdate - ");
3319 if (minecraft->level->hasChunkAt(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z))
3320 {
3321 shared_ptr<TileEntity> te = minecraft->level->getTileEntity(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
3322
3323 // 4J-PB - on a client connecting, the line below fails
3324 if (dynamic_pointer_cast<SignTileEntity>(te) != nullptr)
3325 {
3326 shared_ptr<SignTileEntity> ste = dynamic_pointer_cast<SignTileEntity>(te);
3327 for (int i = 0; i < MAX_SIGN_LINES; i++)
3328 {
3329 ste->SetMessage(i,packet->lines[i]);
3330 }
3331
3332 app.DebugPrintf("verified = %d\tCensored = %d\n",packet->m_bVerified,packet->m_bCensored);
3333 ste->SetVerified(packet->m_bVerified);
3334 ste->SetCensored(packet->m_bCensored);
3335
3336 ste->setChanged();
3337 }
3338 else
3339 {
3340 app.DebugPrintf("dynamic_pointer_cast<SignTileEntity>(te) == nullptr\n");
3341 }
3342 }
3343 else
3344 {
3345 app.DebugPrintf("hasChunkAt failed\n");
3346 }
3347}
3348
3349void ClientConnection::handleTileEntityData(shared_ptr<TileEntityDataPacket> packet)
3350{
3351 if (minecraft->level->hasChunkAt(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z))
3352 {
3353 shared_ptr<TileEntity> te = minecraft->level->getTileEntity(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z);
3354
3355 if (te != nullptr)
3356 {
3357 if (packet->type == TileEntityDataPacket::TYPE_MOB_SPAWNER && dynamic_pointer_cast<MobSpawnerTileEntity>(te) != nullptr)
3358 {
3359 dynamic_pointer_cast<MobSpawnerTileEntity>(te)->load(packet->tag);
3360 }
3361 else if (packet->type == TileEntityDataPacket::TYPE_ADV_COMMAND && dynamic_pointer_cast<CommandBlockEntity>(te) != nullptr)
3362 {
3363 dynamic_pointer_cast<CommandBlockEntity>(te)->load(packet->tag);
3364 }
3365 else if (packet->type == TileEntityDataPacket::TYPE_BEACON && dynamic_pointer_cast<BeaconTileEntity>(te) != nullptr)
3366 {
3367 dynamic_pointer_cast<BeaconTileEntity>(te)->load(packet->tag);
3368 }
3369 else if (packet->type == TileEntityDataPacket::TYPE_SKULL && dynamic_pointer_cast<SkullTileEntity>(te) != nullptr)
3370 {
3371 dynamic_pointer_cast<SkullTileEntity>(te)->load(packet->tag);
3372 }
3373 }
3374 }
3375}
3376
3377void ClientConnection::handleContainerSetData(shared_ptr<ContainerSetDataPacket> packet)
3378{
3379 onUnhandledPacket(packet);
3380 if (minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->containerMenu != nullptr && minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->containerMenu->containerId == packet->containerId)
3381 {
3382 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->containerMenu->setData(packet->id, packet->value);
3383 }
3384}
3385
3386void ClientConnection::handleSetEquippedItem(shared_ptr<SetEquippedItemPacket> packet)
3387{
3388 shared_ptr<Entity> entity = getEntity(packet->entity);
3389 if (entity != nullptr)
3390 {
3391 // 4J Stu - Brought forward change from 1.3 to fix #64688 - Customer Encountered: TU7: Content: Art: Aura of enchanted item is not displayed for other players in online game
3392 entity->setEquippedSlot(packet->slot, packet->getItem() );
3393 }
3394}
3395
3396void ClientConnection::handleContainerClose(shared_ptr<ContainerClosePacket> packet)
3397{
3398 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->clientSideCloseContainer();
3399}
3400
3401void ClientConnection::handleTileEvent(shared_ptr<TileEventPacket> packet)
3402{
3403 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Handle tile event\n");
3404 minecraft->level->tileEvent(packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->tile, packet->b0, packet->b1);
3405 PIXEndNamedEvent();
3406}
3407
3408void ClientConnection::handleTileDestruction(shared_ptr<TileDestructionPacket> packet)
3409{
3410 minecraft->level->destroyTileProgress(packet->getEntityId(), packet->getX(), packet->getY(), packet->getZ(), packet->getState());
3411}
3412
3413bool ClientConnection::canHandleAsyncPackets()
3414{
3415 return minecraft != nullptr && minecraft->level != nullptr && minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex] != nullptr && level != nullptr;
3416}
3417
3418void ClientConnection::handleGameEvent(shared_ptr<GameEventPacket> gameEventPacket)
3419{
3420 int event = gameEventPacket->_event;
3421 int param = gameEventPacket->param;
3422 if (event >= 0 && event < GameEventPacket::EVENT_LANGUAGE_ID_LENGTH)
3423 {
3424 if (GameEventPacket::EVENT_LANGUAGE_ID[event] > 0) // 4J - was nullptr check
3425 {
3426 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->displayClientMessage(GameEventPacket::EVENT_LANGUAGE_ID[event]);
3427 }
3428 }
3429 if (event == GameEventPacket::START_RAINING)
3430 {
3431 level->getLevelData()->setRaining(true);
3432 level->setRainLevel(1);
3433 }
3434 else if (event == GameEventPacket::STOP_RAINING)
3435 {
3436 level->getLevelData()->setRaining(false);
3437 level->setRainLevel(0);
3438 }
3439 else if (event == GameEventPacket::CHANGE_GAME_MODE)
3440 {
3441 minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex]->setLocalMode(GameType::byId(param));
3442 }
3443 else if (event == GameEventPacket::WIN_GAME)
3444 {
3445 ui.SetWinUserIndex( (BYTE)gameEventPacket->param );
3446
3447#ifdef _XBOX
3448
3449 // turn off the gamertags in splitscreen for the primary player, since they are about to be made fullscreen
3450 ui.HideAllGameUIElements();
3451
3452 // Hide the other players scenes
3453 ui.ShowOtherPlayersBaseScene(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), false);
3454
3455 // This just allows it to be shown
3456 if(minecraft->localgameModes[ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()] != nullptr) minecraft->localgameModes[ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()]->getTutorial()->showTutorialPopup(false);
3457 // Temporarily make this scene fullscreen
3458 CXuiSceneBase::SetPlayerBaseScenePosition( ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), CXuiSceneBase::e_BaseScene_Fullscreen );
3459
3460 app.CloseXuiScenesAndNavigateToScene(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),eUIScene_EndPoem);
3461#else
3462 app.DebugPrintf("handleGameEvent packet for WIN_GAME - %d\n", m_userIndex);
3463 // This just allows it to be shown
3464 if(minecraft->localgameModes[ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()] != nullptr) minecraft->localgameModes[ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad()]->getTutorial()->showTutorialPopup(false);
3465 ui.NavigateToScene(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), eUIScene_EndPoem, nullptr, eUILayer_Scene, eUIGroup_Fullscreen);
3466#endif
3467 }
3468 else if( event == GameEventPacket::START_SAVING )
3469 {
3470 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost())
3471 {
3472 // Move app started to here so that it happens immediately otherwise back-to-back START/STOP packets
3473 // leave the client stuck in the loading screen
3474 app.SetGameStarted(false);
3475 app.SetAction( ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), eAppAction_RemoteServerSave );
3476 }
3477 }
3478 else if( event == GameEventPacket::STOP_SAVING )
3479 {
3480 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() ) app.SetGameStarted(true);
3481 }
3482 else if ( event == GameEventPacket::SUCCESSFUL_BOW_HIT )
3483 {
3484 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3485 level->playLocalSound(player->x, player->y + player->getHeadHeight(), player->z, eSoundType_RANDOM_BOW_HIT , 0.18f, 0.45f, false);
3486 }
3487}
3488
3489void ClientConnection::handleComplexItemData(shared_ptr<ComplexItemDataPacket> packet)
3490{
3491 if (packet->itemType == Item::map->id)
3492 {
3493 MapItem::getSavedData(packet->itemId, minecraft->level)->handleComplexItemData(packet->data);
3494 }
3495 else
3496 {
3497// System.out.println("Unknown itemid: " + packet->itemId); // 4J removed
3498 }
3499}
3500
3501
3502
3503void ClientConnection::handleLevelEvent(shared_ptr<LevelEventPacket> packet)
3504{
3505 if (!shouldProcessForPosition(packet->x, packet->z)) return;
3506 if (packet->type == LevelEvent::SOUND_DRAGON_DEATH)
3507 {
3508 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++i)
3509 {
3510 if(minecraft->localplayers[i] != nullptr && minecraft->localplayers[i]->level != nullptr && minecraft->localplayers[i]->level->dimension->id == 1)
3511 {
3512 minecraft->localplayers[i]->awardStat(GenericStats::completeTheEnd(),GenericStats::param_noArgs());
3513 }
3514 }
3515 }
3516
3517 if (packet->isGlobalEvent())
3518 {
3519 minecraft->level->globalLevelEvent(packet->type, packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->data);
3520 }
3521 else
3522 {
3523 minecraft->level->levelEvent(packet->type, packet->x, packet->y, packet->z, packet->data);
3524 }
3525}
3526
3527void ClientConnection::handleAwardStat(shared_ptr<AwardStatPacket> packet)
3528{
3529 minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->awardStatFromServer(GenericStats::stat(packet->statId), packet->getParamData());
3530}
3531
3532void ClientConnection::handleUpdateMobEffect(shared_ptr<UpdateMobEffectPacket> packet)
3533{
3534 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->entityId);
3535 if ( (e == nullptr) || !e->instanceof(eTYPE_LIVINGENTITY) ) return;
3536
3537 //( dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(e) )->addEffect(new MobEffectInstance(packet->effectId, packet->effectDurationTicks, packet->effectAmplifier));
3538
3539 MobEffectInstance *mobEffectInstance = new MobEffectInstance(packet->effectId, packet->effectDurationTicks, packet->effectAmplifier);
3540 mobEffectInstance->setNoCounter(packet->isSuperLongDuration());
3541 dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(e)->addEffect(mobEffectInstance);
3542}
3543
3544void ClientConnection::handleRemoveMobEffect(shared_ptr<RemoveMobEffectPacket> packet)
3545{
3546 shared_ptr<Entity> e = getEntity(packet->entityId);
3547 if ( (e == nullptr) || !e->instanceof(eTYPE_LIVINGENTITY) ) return;
3548
3549 ( dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(e) )->removeEffectNoUpdate(packet->effectId);
3550}
3551
3552bool ClientConnection::isServerPacketListener()
3553{
3554 return false;
3555}
3556
3557void ClientConnection::handlePlayerInfo(shared_ptr<PlayerInfoPacket> packet)
3558{
3559 unsigned int startingPrivileges = app.GetPlayerPrivileges(packet->m_networkSmallId);
3560
3561 INetworkPlayer *networkPlayer = g_NetworkManager.GetPlayerBySmallId(packet->m_networkSmallId);
3562
3563 if(networkPlayer != nullptr && networkPlayer->IsHost())
3564 {
3565 // Some settings should always be considered on for the host player
3566 Player::enableAllPlayerPrivileges(startingPrivileges,true);
3567 Player::setPlayerGamePrivilege(startingPrivileges,Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_HOST,1);
3568 }
3569
3570 // 4J Stu - Repurposed this packet for player info that we want
3571 app.UpdatePlayerInfo(packet->m_networkSmallId, packet->m_playerColourIndex, packet->m_playerPrivileges);
3572
3573 shared_ptr<Entity> entity = getEntity(packet->m_entityId);
3574 if(entity != nullptr && entity->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
3575 {
3576 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(entity);
3577 player->setPlayerGamePrivilege(Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_All, packet->m_playerPrivileges);
3578 }
3579 if(networkPlayer != nullptr && networkPlayer->IsLocal())
3580 {
3581 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < XUSER_MAX_COUNT; ++i)
3582 {
3583 shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> localPlayer = minecraft->localplayers[i];
3584 if(localPlayer != nullptr && localPlayer->connection != nullptr && localPlayer->connection->getNetworkPlayer() == networkPlayer )
3585 {
3586 localPlayer->setPlayerGamePrivilege(Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_All,packet->m_playerPrivileges);
3587 displayPrivilegeChanges(localPlayer,startingPrivileges);
3588 break;
3589 }
3590 }
3591 }
3592
3593 // 4J Stu - I don't think we care about this, so not converting it (came from 1.8.2)
3594#if 0
3595 PlayerInfo pi = playerInfoMap.get(packet.name);
3596 if (pi == null && packet.add) {
3597 pi = new PlayerInfo(packet.name);
3598 playerInfoMap.put(packet.name, pi);
3599 playerInfos.add(pi);
3600 }
3601 if (pi != null && !packet.add) {
3602 playerInfoMap.remove(packet.name);
3603 playerInfos.remove(pi);
3604 }
3605 if (packet.add && pi != null) {
3606 pi.latency = packet.latency;
3607 }
3608#endif
3609}
3610
3611
3612void ClientConnection::displayPrivilegeChanges(shared_ptr<MultiplayerLocalPlayer> player, unsigned int oldPrivileges)
3613{
3614 int userIndex = player->GetXboxPad();
3615 unsigned int newPrivileges = player->getAllPlayerGamePrivileges();
3616 Player::EPlayerGamePrivileges priv = (Player::EPlayerGamePrivileges)0;
3617 bool privOn = false;
3618 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_MAX; ++i)
3619 {
3620 priv = (Player::EPlayerGamePrivileges) i;
3621 if( Player::getPlayerGamePrivilege(newPrivileges,priv) != Player::getPlayerGamePrivilege(oldPrivileges,priv))
3622 {
3623 privOn = Player::getPlayerGamePrivilege(newPrivileges,priv);
3624 wstring message = L"";
3625 if(app.GetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_TrustPlayers) == 0)
3626 {
3627 switch(priv)
3628 {
3629 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CannotMine:
3630 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_MINE_TOGGLE_ON);
3631 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_MINE_TOGGLE_OFF);
3632 break;
3633 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CannotBuild:
3634 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_BUILD_TOGGLE_ON);
3635 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_BUILD_TOGGLE_OFF);
3636 break;
3637 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanUseDoorsAndSwitches:
3638 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_USE_DOORS_TOGGLE_ON);
3639 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_USE_DOORS_TOGGLE_OFF);
3640 break;
3641 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanUseContainers:
3642 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_USE_CONTAINERS_TOGGLE_ON);
3643 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_USE_CONTAINERS_TOGGLE_OFF);
3644 break;
3645 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CannotAttackAnimals:
3646 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_ANIMAL_TOGGLE_ON);
3647 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_ANIMAL_TOGGLE_OFF);
3648 break;
3649 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CannotAttackMobs:
3650 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_MOB_TOGGLE_ON);
3651 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_MOB_TOGGLE_OFF);
3652 break;
3653 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CannotAttackPlayers:
3654 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_PLAYER_TOGGLE_ON);
3655 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_PLAYER_TOGGLE_OFF);
3656 break;
3657 };
3658 }
3659 switch(priv)
3660 {
3661 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_Op:
3662 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_MODERATOR_TOGGLE_ON);
3663 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_MODERATOR_TOGGLE_OFF);
3664 break;
3665 };
3666 if(app.GetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_CheatsEnabled) != 0)
3667 {
3668 switch(priv)
3669 {
3670 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanFly:
3671 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_FLY_TOGGLE_ON);
3672 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_FLY_TOGGLE_OFF);
3673 break;
3674 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_ClassicHunger:
3675 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_ON);
3676 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_OFF);
3677 break;
3678 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_Invisible:
3679 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_INVISIBLE_TOGGLE_ON);
3680 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_INVISIBLE_TOGGLE_OFF);
3681 break;
3682 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_Invulnerable:
3683 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_INVULNERABLE_TOGGLE_ON);
3684 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_INVULNERABLE_TOGGLE_OFF);
3685 break;
3686 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanToggleInvisible:
3687 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_INVISIBLE_TOGGLE_ON);
3688 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_INVISIBLE_TOGGLE_OFF);
3689 break;
3690 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanToggleFly:
3691 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_FLY_TOGGLE_ON);
3692 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_FLY_TOGGLE_OFF);
3693 break;
3694 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanToggleClassicHunger:
3695 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_ON);
3696 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_OFF);
3697 break;
3698 case Player::ePlayerGamePrivilege_CanTeleport:
3699 if(privOn) message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_TELEPORT_TOGGLE_ON);
3700 else message = app.GetString(IDS_PRIV_CAN_TELEPORT_TOGGLE_OFF);
3701 break;
3702 };
3703 }
3704 if(!message.empty()) minecraft->gui->addMessage(message,userIndex);
3705 }
3706 }
3707}
3708
3709void ClientConnection::handleKeepAlive(shared_ptr<KeepAlivePacket> packet)
3710{
3711 send(std::make_shared<KeepAlivePacket>(packet->id));
3712}
3713
3714void ClientConnection::handlePlayerAbilities(shared_ptr<PlayerAbilitiesPacket> playerAbilitiesPacket)
3715{
3716 shared_ptr<Player> player = minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex];
3717 player->abilities.flying = playerAbilitiesPacket->isFlying();
3718 player->abilities.instabuild = playerAbilitiesPacket->canInstabuild();
3719 player->abilities.invulnerable = playerAbilitiesPacket->isInvulnerable();
3720 player->abilities.mayfly = playerAbilitiesPacket->canFly();
3721 player->abilities.setFlyingSpeed(playerAbilitiesPacket->getFlyingSpeed());
3722 player->abilities.setWalkingSpeed(playerAbilitiesPacket->getWalkingSpeed());
3723}
3724
3725void ClientConnection::handleSoundEvent(shared_ptr<LevelSoundPacket> packet)
3726{
3727 minecraft->level->playLocalSound(packet->getX(), packet->getY(), packet->getZ(), packet->getSound(), packet->getVolume(), packet->getPitch(), false);
3728}
3729
3730void ClientConnection::handleCustomPayload(shared_ptr<CustomPayloadPacket> customPayloadPacket)
3731{
3732 if (CustomPayloadPacket::TRADER_LIST_PACKET.compare(customPayloadPacket->identifier) == 0)
3733 {
3734 ByteArrayInputStream bais(customPayloadPacket->data);
3735 DataInputStream input(&bais);
3736 int containerId = input.readInt();
3737 if (ui.IsSceneInStack(m_userIndex, eUIScene_TradingMenu) && containerId == minecraft->localplayers[m_userIndex]->containerMenu->containerId)
3738 {
3739 shared_ptr<Merchant> trader = nullptr;
3740
3741#ifdef _XBOX
3742 HXUIOBJ scene = app.GetCurrentScene(m_userIndex);
3743 HXUICLASS thisClass = XuiFindClass( L"CXuiSceneTrading" );
3744 HXUICLASS objClass = XuiGetObjectClass( scene );
3745
3746 // Also returns TRUE if they are the same (which is what we want)
3747 if( XuiClassDerivesFrom( objClass, thisClass ) )
3748 {
3749 CXuiSceneTrading *screen;
3750 HRESULT hr = XuiObjectFromHandle(scene, (void **) &screen);
3751 if (FAILED(hr)) return;
3752 trader = screen->getMerchant();
3753 }
3754#else
3755 UIScene *scene = ui.GetTopScene(m_userIndex, eUILayer_Scene);
3756 UIScene_TradingMenu *screen = (UIScene_TradingMenu *)scene;
3757 trader = screen->getMerchant();
3758#endif
3759
3760 MerchantRecipeList *recipeList = MerchantRecipeList::createFromStream(&input);
3761 trader->overrideOffers(recipeList);
3762 }
3763 }
3764}
3765
3766Connection *ClientConnection::getConnection()
3767{
3768 return connection;
3769}
3770
3771// 4J Added
3772void ClientConnection::handleServerSettingsChanged(shared_ptr<ServerSettingsChangedPacket> packet)
3773{
3774 if(packet->action==ServerSettingsChangedPacket::HOST_IN_GAME_SETTINGS)
3775 {
3776 app.SetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_All, packet->data);
3777 }
3778 else if(packet->action==ServerSettingsChangedPacket::HOST_DIFFICULTY)
3779 {
3780 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < minecraft->levels.length; ++i)
3781 {
3782 if( minecraft->levels[i] != nullptr )
3783 {
3784 app.DebugPrintf("ClientConnection::handleServerSettingsChanged - Difficulty = %d",packet->data);
3785 minecraft->levels[i]->difficulty = packet->data;
3786 }
3787 }
3788 }
3789 else
3790 {
3791 //options
3792 //minecraft->options->SetGamertagSetting((packet->data==0)?false:true);
3793 app.SetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_Gamertags, packet->data);
3794 }
3795
3796}
3797
3798void ClientConnection::handleXZ(shared_ptr<XZPacket> packet)
3799{
3800 if(packet->action==XZPacket::STRONGHOLD)
3801 {
3802 minecraft->levels[0]->getLevelData()->setXStronghold(packet->x);
3803 minecraft->levels[0]->getLevelData()->setZStronghold(packet->z);
3804 minecraft->levels[0]->getLevelData()->setHasStronghold();
3805 }
3806}
3807
3808void ClientConnection::handleUpdateProgress(shared_ptr<UpdateProgressPacket> packet)
3809{
3810 if(!g_NetworkManager.IsHost() ) Minecraft::GetInstance()->progressRenderer->progressStagePercentage( packet->m_percentage );
3811}
3812
3813void ClientConnection::handleUpdateGameRuleProgressPacket(shared_ptr<UpdateGameRuleProgressPacket> packet)
3814{
3815 LPCWSTR string = app.GetGameRulesString(packet->m_messageId);
3816 if(string != nullptr)
3817 {
3818 wstring message(string);
3819 message = GameRuleDefinition::generateDescriptionString(packet->m_definitionType,message,packet->m_data.data,packet->m_data.length);
3820 if(minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex]!=nullptr)
3821 {
3822 minecraft->localgameModes[m_userIndex]->getTutorial()->setMessage(message, packet->m_icon, packet->m_auxValue);
3823 }
3824 }
3825 // If this rule has a data tag associated with it, then we save that in user profile data
3826 if(packet->m_dataTag > 0 && packet->m_dataTag <= 32)
3827 {
3828 app.DebugPrintf("handleUpdateGameRuleProgressPacket: Data tag is in range, so updating profile data\n");
3829 app.SetSpecialTutorialCompletionFlag(m_userIndex, packet->m_dataTag - 1);
3830 }
3831 delete [] packet->m_data.data;
3832}
3833
3834// 4J Stu - TU-1 hotfix
3835// Fix for #13191 - The host of a game can get a message informing them that the connection to the server has been lost
3836int ClientConnection::HostDisconnectReturned(void *pParam,int iPad,C4JStorage::EMessageResult result)
3837{
3838 // 4J-PB - if they have a trial texture pack, they don't get to save the world
3839 if(!Minecraft::GetInstance()->skins->isUsingDefaultSkin())
3840 {
3841 TexturePack *tPack = Minecraft::GetInstance()->skins->getSelected();
3842 DLCTexturePack *pDLCTexPack=(DLCTexturePack *)tPack;
3843
3844 DLCPack *pDLCPack=pDLCTexPack->getDLCInfoParentPack();//tPack->getDLCPack();
3845 if(!pDLCPack->hasPurchasedFile( DLCManager::e_DLCType_Texture, L"" ))
3846 {
3847 // no upsell, we're about to quit
3848 MinecraftServer::getInstance()->setSaveOnExit( false );
3849 // flag a app action of exit game
3850 app.SetAction(iPad,eAppAction_ExitWorld);
3851 }
3852 }
3853
3854#if defined(_XBOX_ONE) || defined(__ORBIS__)
3855 // Give the player the option to save their game
3856 // does the save exist?
3857 bool bSaveExists;
3858 StorageManager.DoesSaveExist(&bSaveExists);
3859 // 4J-PB - we check if the save exists inside the libs
3860 // we need to ask if they are sure they want to overwrite the existing game
3861 if(bSaveExists && StorageManager.GetSaveDisabled())
3862 {
3863 UINT uiIDA[2];
3864 uiIDA[0]=IDS_CONFIRM_CANCEL;
3865 uiIDA[1]=IDS_CONFIRM_OK;
3866 ui.RequestErrorMessage(IDS_TITLE_SAVE_GAME, IDS_CONFIRM_SAVE_GAME, uiIDA, 2, ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),&ClientConnection::ExitGameAndSaveReturned,nullptr);
3867 }
3868 else
3869#else
3870 // Give the player the option to save their game
3871 // does the save exist?
3872 bool bSaveExists;
3873 StorageManager.DoesSaveExist(&bSaveExists);
3874 // 4J-PB - we check if the save exists inside the libs
3875 // we need to ask if they are sure they want to overwrite the existing game
3876 if(bSaveExists)
3877 {
3878 UINT uiIDA[2];
3879 uiIDA[0]=IDS_CONFIRM_CANCEL;
3880 uiIDA[1]=IDS_CONFIRM_OK;
3881 ui.RequestErrorMessage(IDS_TITLE_SAVE_GAME, IDS_CONFIRM_SAVE_GAME, uiIDA, 2, ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(),&ClientConnection::ExitGameAndSaveReturned,nullptr);
3882 }
3883 else
3884#endif
3885 {
3886#if defined(_XBOX_ONE) || defined(__ORBIS__)
3887 StorageManager.SetSaveDisabled(false);
3888#endif
3889 MinecraftServer::getInstance()->setSaveOnExit( true );
3890 // flag a app action of exit game
3891 app.SetAction(iPad,eAppAction_ExitWorld);
3892 }
3893
3894 return 0;
3895}
3896
3897int ClientConnection::ExitGameAndSaveReturned(void *pParam,int iPad,C4JStorage::EMessageResult result)
3898{
3899 // results switched for this dialog
3900 if(result==C4JStorage::EMessage_ResultDecline)
3901 {
3902 //INT saveOrCheckpointId = 0;
3903 //bool validSave = StorageManager.GetSaveUniqueNumber(&saveOrCheckpointId);
3904 //SentientManager.RecordLevelSaveOrCheckpoint(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad(), saveOrCheckpointId);
3905#if defined(_XBOX_ONE) || defined(__ORBIS__)
3906 StorageManager.SetSaveDisabled(false);
3907#endif
3908 MinecraftServer::getInstance()->setSaveOnExit( true );
3909 }
3910 else
3911 {
3912 MinecraftServer::getInstance()->setSaveOnExit( false );
3913 }
3914 // flag a app action of exit game
3915 app.SetAction(iPad,eAppAction_ExitWorld);
3916 return 0;
3917}
3918
3919//
3920wstring ClientConnection::GetDisplayNameByGamertag(wstring gamertag)
3921{
3922#ifdef _DURANGO
3923 wstring displayName = g_NetworkManager.GetDisplayNameByGamertag(gamertag);
3924 return displayName;
3925#else
3926 return gamertag;
3927#endif
3928}
3929
3930void ClientConnection::handleAddObjective(shared_ptr<SetObjectivePacket> packet)
3931{
3932#if 0
3933 Scoreboard scoreboard = level->getScoreboard();
3934
3935 if (packet->method == SetObjectivePacket::METHOD_ADD)
3936 {
3937 Objective objective = scoreboard->addObjective(packet->objectiveName, ObjectiveCriteria::DUMMY);
3938 objective->setDisplayName(packet->displayName);
3939 }
3940 else
3941 {
3942 Objective objective = scoreboard->getObjective(packet->objectiveName);
3943
3944 if (packet->method == SetObjectivePacket::METHOD_REMOVE)
3945 {
3946 scoreboard->removeObjective(objective);
3947 }
3948 else if (packet->method == SetObjectivePacket::METHOD_CHANGE)
3949 {
3950 objective->setDisplayName(packet->displayName);
3951 }
3952 }
3953#endif
3954}
3955
3956void ClientConnection::handleSetScore(shared_ptr<SetScorePacket> packet)
3957{
3958#if 0
3959 Scoreboard scoreboard = level->getScoreboard();
3960 Objective objective = scoreboard->getObjective(packet->objectiveName);
3961
3962 if (packet->method == SetScorePacket::METHOD_CHANGE)
3963 {
3964 Score score = scoreboard->getPlayerScore(packet->owner, objective);
3965 score->setScore(packet->score);
3966 }
3967 else if (packet->method == SetScorePacket::METHOD_REMOVE)
3968 {
3969 scoreboard->resetPlayerScore(packet->owner);
3970 }
3971#endif
3972}
3973
3974void ClientConnection::handleSetDisplayObjective(shared_ptr<SetDisplayObjectivePacket> packet)
3975{
3976#if 0
3977 Scoreboard scoreboard = level->getScoreboard();
3978
3979 if (packet->objectiveName->length() == 0)
3980 {
3981 scoreboard->setDisplayObjective(packet->slot, null);
3982 }
3983 else
3984 {
3985 Objective objective = scoreboard->getObjective(packet->objectiveName);
3986 scoreboard->setDisplayObjective(packet->slot, objective);
3987 }
3988#endif
3989}
3990
3991void ClientConnection::handleSetPlayerTeamPacket(shared_ptr<SetPlayerTeamPacket> packet)
3992{
3993#if 0
3994 Scoreboard scoreboard = level->getScoreboard();
3995 PlayerTeam *team;
3996
3997 if (packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_ADD)
3998 {
3999 team = scoreboard->addPlayerTeam(packet->name);
4000 }
4001 else
4002 {
4003 team = scoreboard->getPlayerTeam(packet->name);
4004 }
4005
4006 if (packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_ADD || packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_CHANGE)
4007 {
4008 team->setDisplayName(packet->displayName);
4009 team->setPrefix(packet->prefix);
4010 team->setSuffix(packet->suffix);
4011 team->unpackOptions(packet->options);
4012 }
4013
4014 if (packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_ADD || packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_JOIN)
4015 {
4016 for (size_t i = 0; i < packet->players.size(); i++)
4017 {
4018 scoreboard->addPlayerToTeam(packet->players[i], team);
4019 }
4020 }
4021
4022 if (packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_LEAVE)
4023 {
4024 for (size_t i = 0; i < packet->players.size(); i++)
4025 {
4026 scoreboard->removePlayerFromTeam(packet->players[i], team);
4027 }
4028 }
4029
4030 if (packet->method == SetPlayerTeamPacket::METHOD_REMOVE)
4031 {
4032 scoreboard->removePlayerTeam(team);
4033 }
4034#endif
4035}
4036
4037void ClientConnection::handleParticleEvent(shared_ptr<LevelParticlesPacket> packet)
4038{
4039 for (int i = 0; i < packet->getCount(); i++)
4040 {
4041 double xVarience = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getXDist();
4042 double yVarience = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getYDist();
4043 double zVarience = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getZDist();
4044 double xa = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getMaxSpeed();
4045 double ya = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getMaxSpeed();
4046 double za = random->nextGaussian() * packet->getMaxSpeed();
4047
4048 // TODO: determine particle ID from name
4049 assert(0);
4050 ePARTICLE_TYPE particleId = eParticleType_heart;
4051
4052 level->addParticle(particleId, packet->getX() + xVarience, packet->getY() + yVarience, packet->getZ() + zVarience, xa, ya, za);
4053 }
4054}
4055
4056void ClientConnection::handleUpdateAttributes(shared_ptr<UpdateAttributesPacket> packet)
4057{
4058 shared_ptr<Entity> entity = getEntity(packet->getEntityId());
4059 if (entity == nullptr) return;
4060
4061 if ( !entity->instanceof(eTYPE_LIVINGENTITY) )
4062 {
4063 // Entity is not a living entity!
4064 assert(0);
4065 }
4066
4067 BaseAttributeMap *attributes = (dynamic_pointer_cast<LivingEntity>(entity))->getAttributes();
4068 unordered_set<UpdateAttributesPacket::AttributeSnapshot *> attributeSnapshots = packet->getValues();
4069 for ( UpdateAttributesPacket::AttributeSnapshot *attribute : attributeSnapshots )
4070 {
4071 AttributeInstance *instance = attributes->getInstance(attribute->getId());
4072
4073 if (instance)
4074 {
4075 // 4J - TODO: revisit, not familiar with the attribute system, why are we passing in MIN_NORMAL (Java's smallest non-zero value conforming to IEEE Standard 754 (?)) and MAX_VALUE
4076 instance = attributes->registerAttribute(new RangedAttribute(attribute->getId(), 0, Double::MIN_NORMAL, Double::MAX_VALUE));
4077 instance->setBaseValue(attribute->getBase());
4078 instance->removeModifiers();
4079
4080 unordered_set<AttributeModifier *> *modifiers = attribute->getModifiers();
4081
4082 if ( modifiers )
4083 {
4084 for ( AttributeModifier* modifier : *modifiers )
4085 {
4086 instance->addModifier(new AttributeModifier(modifier->getId(), modifier->getAmount(), modifier->getOperation()));
4087 }
4088 }
4089 }
4090 }
4091}
4092
4093// 4J: Check for deferred entity link packets related to this entity ID and handle them
4094void ClientConnection::checkDeferredEntityLinkPackets(int newEntityId)
4095{
4096 if (deferredEntityLinkPackets.empty()) return;
4097
4098 for (size_t i = 0; i < deferredEntityLinkPackets.size(); i++)
4099 {
4100 DeferredEntityLinkPacket *deferred = &deferredEntityLinkPackets[i];
4101
4102 bool remove = false;
4103
4104 // Only consider recently deferred packets
4105 int tickInterval = GetTickCount() - deferred->m_recievedTick;
4106 if (tickInterval < MAX_ENTITY_LINK_DEFERRAL_INTERVAL)
4107 {
4108 // Note: we assume it's the destination entity
4109 if (deferred->m_packet->destId == newEntityId)
4110 {
4111 handleEntityLinkPacket(deferred->m_packet);
4112 remove = true;
4113 }
4114 }
4115 else
4116 {
4117 // This is an old packet, remove (shouldn't really come up but seems prudent)
4118 remove = true;
4119 }
4120
4121 if (remove)
4122 {
4123 deferredEntityLinkPackets.erase(deferredEntityLinkPackets.begin() + i);
4124 i--;
4125 }
4126 }
4127}
4128
4129ClientConnection::DeferredEntityLinkPacket::DeferredEntityLinkPacket(shared_ptr<SetEntityLinkPacket> packet)
4130{
4131 m_recievedTick = GetTickCount();
4132 m_packet = packet;
4133}
